    jget(args_json, "end_line", s_end, sizeof(s_end));

    if (!path[0]) return strdup("Error: 'path' is required");
    if (!allow_write) return strdup("patch_file is disabled. Agent does not have --allow-write permission.");

    int start = atoi(s_start), end = atoi(s_end);
    if (start < 1 || end < start) return strdup("Error: invalid start_line/end_line (1-based, end >= start)");

    /* Read existing file into lines */
    FILE *fp = fopen(path, "rb");
    if (!fp) {
        char err[600];
        snprintf(err, sizeof(err), "Error: cannot open '%s' for reading", path);
        if (result) result_add_error(result, err);
        return strdup(err);
    }
    fseek(fp, 0, SEEK_END);
    long fsize = ftell(fp);
    fseek(fp, 0, SEEK_SET);
    if (fsize > MAX_CONV_BUF) { fclose(fp); return strdup("Error: file too large to patch"); }

    char *filebuf = malloc(fsize + 1);
    if (!filebuf) { fclose(fp); return strdup("Error: out of memory"); }
    fread(filebuf, 1, fsize, fp);
    filebuf[fsize] = 0;
    fclose(fp);

    /* Split into lines */
    char *lines[65536];
    int nlines = 0;
    char *p = filebuf;
    while (*p && nlines < 65535) {
        lines[nlines++] = p;
        char *nl = strchr(p, '\n');
        if (nl) { *nl = 0; p = nl + 1; }
        else break;
    }

    if (end > nlines) { free(filebuf); return strdup("Error: end_line beyond file length"); }

    /* Create .bak */
    char bak[520];
    snprintf(bak, sizeof(bak), "%s.bak", path);
    FILE *bfp = fopen(bak, "wb");
    if (bfp) {
        /* Reconstruct original */
        for (int i = 0; i < nlines; i++) {
            fputs(lines[i], bfp);
            if (i < nlines - 1) fputc('\n', bfp);
        }
        fclose(bfp);
    }

    /* Write patched file */
    fp = fopen(path, "wb");
    if (!fp) { free(filebuf); return strdup("Error: cannot reopen file for writing"); }

    for (int i = 0; i < start - 1; i++) { fputs(lines[i], fp); fputc('\n', fp); }
    fputs(new_content, fp);
    if (new_content[0] && new_content[strlen(new_content)-1] != '\n') fputc('\n', fp);
    for (int i = end; i < nlines; i++) { fputs(lines[i], fp); if (i < nlines - 1) fputc('\n', fp); }
    fclose(fp);
    free(filebuf);

    char msg[600];
    /* Auto-fingerprint after patch (mirrors PostToolUse Edit hook) */
    { char sc[600]; snprintf(sc, sizeof(sc), "xyzt_io store \"%s\"", path); run_timed(sc, NULL, 0, 5000); }

    snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg), "Patched %s lines %d-%d (%s.bak created)", path, start, end, path);
    if (result) {
        char entry[512];
        snprintf(entry, sizeof(entry), "patch:%s:L%d-L%d", path, start, end);
        result_add_write(result, entry);
    }
    return strdup(msg);
}

/* ── Tool table ── */

#define MAX_TOOLS 17

typedef struct {
    const char *name;
    const char *description;
    const char *params_schema;  /* JSON Schema for parameters */
} ToolDef;

static const ToolDef TOOLS[] = {

#define N_TOOLS (int)(sizeof(TOOLS) / sizeof(TOOLS[0]))

/* Build shell command from tool name + JSON args. Returns 0 on success. */
static int build_tool_cmd(const char *name, const char *args_json, char *cmd, int max) {
    char val[4096] = {0};
    char val2[256] = {0};

    if (strcmp(name, "xyzt_skel") == 0) {
        jget(args_json, "file", val, sizeof(val));
        snprintf(cmd, max, "xyzt_skel \"%s\"", val);
    }
    else if (strcmp(name, "xyzt_index_find") == 0) {
        jget(args_json, "name", val, sizeof(val));
        snprintf(cmd, max, "xyzt_index find \"%s\"", val);
    }
    else if (strcmp(name, "xyzt_io_brief") == 0) {
        jget(args_json, "file", val, sizeof(val));
        snprintf(cmd, max, "xyzt_io brief \"%s\"", val);
    }
    else if (strcmp(name, "xyzt_org_tree") == 0) {
        jget(args_json, "project", val, sizeof(val));
        snprintf(cmd, max, "xyzt_org tree \"%s\"", val);
    }
    else if (strcmp(name, "xyzt_wire_query") == 0) {
        jget(args_json, "name", val, sizeof(val));
        snprintf(cmd, max, "xyzt_wire query \"%s\"", val);
    }
    else if (strcmp(name, "xyzt_err_recent") == 0) {
        snprintf(cmd, max, "xyzt_err recent");
    }
    else if (strcmp(name, "xyzt_map_show") == 0) {
        jget(args_json, "file", val, sizeof(val));
        snprintf(cmd, max, "xyzt_map show \"%s\"", val);
    }
    else if (strcmp(name, "onetwo_known") == 0) {
        jget(args_json, "fact", val, sizeof(val));
        snprintf(cmd, max, "onetwo known \"%s\"", val);
    }
    else if (strcmp(name, "read_file") == 0) {
        jget(args_json, "path", val, sizeof(val));
        jget(args_json, "offset", val2, sizeof(val2));
        char lim[256] = {0};
        jget(args_json, "limit", lim, sizeof(lim));
#ifdef _WIN32
        if (val2[0] && lim[0]) {
            int off = atoi(val2), lm = atoi(lim);
            snprintf(cmd, max, "powershell -Command \"Get-Content '%s' | Select-Object -Skip %d -First %d\"",
                     val, off, lm);
        } else if (lim[0]) {
            snprintf(cmd, max, "powershell -Command \"Get-Content '%s' | Select-Object -First %s\"",
                     val, lim);
        } else {
            snprintf(cmd, max, "type \"%s\"", val);
        }
#else
        if (val2[0] && lim[0])
            snprintf(cmd, max, "sed -n '%s,%dp' \"%s\"", val2, atoi(val2) + atoi(lim), val);
        else if (lim[0])
            snprintf(cmd, max, "head -n %s \"%s\"", lim, val);
        else
            snprintf(cmd, max, "cat \"%s\"", val);
#endif
    }
    else if (strcmp(name, "run_cmd") == 0) {
        jget(args_json, "command", val, sizeof(val));
        snprintf(cmd, max, "%s", val);
    }
    else if (strcmp(name, "xyzt_diff_status") == 0) {
        snprintf(cmd, max, "xyzt_diff status");
    }
    else if (strcmp(name, "xyzt_index_list") == 0) {
        snprintf(cmd, max, "xyzt_index list");
    }
    else if (strcmp(name, "xyzt_test_run") == 0) {
        jget(args_json, "command", val, sizeof(val));
        snprintf(cmd, max, "xyzt_test run \"%s\"", val);
    }
    else if (strcmp(name, "git_diff") == 0) {
        jget(args_json, "args", val, sizeof(val));
        if (val[0])
            snprintf(cmd, max, "git diff %s", val);
        else
            snprintf(cmd, max, "git diff");
    }
    else if (strcmp(name, "git_status") == 0) {
        snprintf(cmd, max, "git status --short");
    }
    else {
        return -1;  /* write_file/patch_file handled in-process */
    }
    return 0;
}

/* Execute a tool by name. Returns heap-allocated output string.
 * v2: allow_write gates write_file/patch_file; result tracks files_read/writes */
static char *execute_tool(const char *name, const char *args_json, int verbose,
                          int allow_write, AgentResult *result) {
    /* In-process write handlers */
    if (strcmp(name, "write_file") == 0)
        return tool_write_file(args_json, allow_write, result);
    if (strcmp(name, "patch_file") == 0)
        return tool_patch_file(args_json, allow_write, result);

    /* Track files read */
    if (result) {
        char path[512] = {0};
        if (strcmp(name, "read_file") == 0) {
            jget(args_json, "path", path, sizeof(path));
            if (path[0]) result_add_file_read(result, path);
        } else if (strcmp(name, "xyzt_skel") == 0 || strcmp(name, "xyzt_io_brief") == 0) {
            jget(args_json, "file", path, sizeof(path));
            if (path[0]) result_add_file_read(result, path);
        } else if (strcmp(name, "xyzt_map_show") == 0) {
            jget(args_json, "file", path, sizeof(path));
            if (path[0]) result_add_file_read(result, path);
        }
    }

    char cmd[MAX_CMD];
    if (build_tool_cmd(name, args_json, cmd, sizeof(cmd)) < 0) {
        char *err = malloc(128);
        snprintf(err, 128, "Unknown tool: %s", name);
        if (result) result_add_error(result, err);
        return err;
    }

    if (verbose) fprintf(stderr, "[agent] tool: %s -> %s\n", name, cmd);

    char *out = malloc(MAX_TOOL_OUT);
    if (!out) return NULL;

    int rc = run_timed(cmd, out, MAX_TOOL_OUT, TOOL_TIMEOUT_MS);
    if (rc < 0) {
        snprintf(out, MAX_TOOL_OUT, "Tool execution failed or timed out: %s", name);
        if (result) result_add_error(result, out);
    }

    /* Truncate if too long */
    int len = (int)strlen(out);
    if (len > MAX_TOOL_OUT - 64) {
        strcpy(out + MAX_TOOL_OUT - 64, "\n... [output truncated]");
    }

    /* Wire integration: link tool usage to current problem */
    wire_auto_link(name);

    /* Auto-store fingerprints for file reads (mirrors PostToolUse Read hook) */
    if (strcmp(name, "read_file") == 0 || strcmp(name, "xyzt_skel") == 0 ||
        strcmp(name, "xyzt_io_brief") == 0) {
        char path[512] = {0};
        jget(args_json, strcmp(name, "read_file") == 0 ? "path" : "file", path, sizeof(path));
        if (path[0]) {
            char store_cmd[600];
            snprintf(store_cmd, sizeof(store_cmd), "xyzt_io store \"%s\"", path);
            run_timed(store_cmd, NULL, 0, 5000);
        }
    }

    /* Auto-snapshot after builds/tests (mirrors PostToolUse Bash hook) */
    if (strcmp(name, "xyzt_test_run") == 0 || strcmp(name, "run_cmd") == 0) {
        run_timed("xyzt_diff snapshot", NULL, 0, 5000);
    }

    return out;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 * Layer 3: Tool Schema Serialization — API-specific formats
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* Serialize tool definitions into API-specific JSON format.
 * Writes into JsonBuf. */
static void tools_json_ollama(JsonBuf *j) {
    /* Ollama/Qwen: [{"type":"function","function":{"name":...,"parameters":...}}] */
    jb_char(j, '[');
    for (int i = 0; i < N_TOOLS; i++) {
        if (i > 0) jb_comma(j);
        jb_raw(j, "{\"type\":\"function\",\"function\":{");
        jb_key_str(j, "name", TOOLS[i].name);
        jb_comma(j);
        jb_key_str(j, "description", TOOLS[i].description);
        jb_comma(j);
        jb_key_raw(j, "parameters", TOOLS[i].params_schema);
        jb_raw(j, "}}");
    }
    jb_char(j, ']');
}

static void tools_json_gemini(JsonBuf *j) {
    /* Gemini: [{"functionDeclarations":[{...}]}] */
    jb_raw(j, "[{\"functionDeclarations\":[");
    for (int i = 0; i < N_TOOLS; i++) {
        if (i > 0) jb_comma(j);
        jb_char(j, '{');
        jb_key_str(j, "name", TOOLS[i].name);
        jb_comma(j);
        jb_key_str(j, "description", TOOLS[i].description);
        jb_comma(j);
        jb_key_raw(j, "parameters", TOOLS[i].params_schema);
        jb_char(j, '}');
    }
    jb_raw(j, "]}]");
}

static void tools_json_claude(JsonBuf *j) {
    /* Claude: [{"name":"...","description":"...","input_schema":{...}}] */
    jb_char(j, '[');
    for (int i = 0; i < N_TOOLS; i++) {
        if (i > 0) jb_comma(j);
        jb_char(j, '{');
        jb_key_str(j, "name", TOOLS[i].name);
        jb_comma(j);
        jb_key_str(j, "description", TOOLS[i].description);
        jb_comma(j);
        jb_key_raw(j, "input_schema", TOOLS[i].params_schema);
        jb_char(j, '}');
    }
    jb_char(j, ']');
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 * Layer 4: Backend Request/Response
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* ── 4a: Ollama — raw socket ── */

static int net_init_done = 0;

static void net_init(void) {
    if (net_init_done) return;
#ifdef _WIN32
    WSADATA wsa;
    WSAStartup(MAKEWORD(2, 2), &wsa);
#endif
    net_init_done = 1;
}

static void net_cleanup(void) {
#ifdef _WIN32
    WSACleanup();
#endif
}

/* Send HTTP POST to Ollama, capture full response. Returns heap-allocated response body. */
static char *ollama_post(const char *body, int body_len) {
    net_init();

#ifdef _WIN32
    SOCKET sock = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, IPPROTO_TCP);
    if (sock == INVALID_SOCKET) return NULL;
#else
    int sock = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0);
    if (sock < 0) return NULL;
#endif

    struct sockaddr_in addr;
    memset(&addr, 0, sizeof(addr));
    addr.sin_family = AF_INET;
    addr.sin_port = htons(OLLAMA_PORT);
    inet_pton(AF_INET, OLLAMA_HOST, &addr.sin_addr);

    if (connect(sock, (struct sockaddr *)&addr, sizeof(addr)) != 0) {
        fprintf(stderr, "[agent] Cannot connect to Ollama at %s:%d\n", OLLAMA_HOST, OLLAMA_PORT);
#ifdef _WIN32
        closesocket(sock);
#else
        close(sock);
#endif
        return NULL;
    }

    char header[512];
    snprintf(header, sizeof(header),
        "POST /api/chat HTTP/1.1\r\n"
        "Host: %s:%d\r\n"
        "Content-Type: application/json\r\n"
        "Content-Length: %d\r\n"
        "Connection: close\r\n"
        "\r\n",
        OLLAMA_HOST, OLLAMA_PORT, body_len);

    send(sock, header, (int)strlen(header), 0);
    send(sock, body, body_len, 0);

    /* Read full response */
    int resp_max = MAX_MSG_BUF;
    char *resp = malloc(resp_max);
    if (!resp) {
#ifdef _WIN32
        closesocket(sock);
#else
        close(sock);
#endif
        return NULL;
    }
    int total = 0;
    while (total < resp_max - 1) {
        int n = recv(sock, resp + total, resp_max - 1 - total, 0);
        if (n <= 0) break;
        total += n;
    }
    resp[total] = 0;
    if (total < 10) fprintf(stderr, "[agent] ollama: recv 0 bytes — connection failed?\n");

#ifdef _WIN32
    closesocket(sock);
#else
    close(sock);
#endif

    /* Skip HTTP header — find \r\n\r\n */
    char *body_start = strstr(resp, "\r\n\r\n");
    if (!body_start) {
        fprintf(stderr, "[agent] ollama: no HTTP header in %d bytes\n", total);
        free(resp);
        return NULL;
    }
    body_start += 4;

    /* Move body to start of buffer */
    int body_size = total - (int)(body_start - resp);
    memmove(resp, body_start, body_size);
    resp[body_size] = 0;

    return resp;
}

/* Build Ollama /api/chat request body. skip_tools=1 omits tool definitions. */
static int ollama_skip_tools = 0;

static char *build_request_ollama(const AgentConfig *cfg, const Conversation *conv) {
    char *buf = malloc(MAX_CONV_BUF);
    if (!buf) return NULL;
    JsonBuf j;
    jb_init(&j, buf, MAX_CONV_BUF);

    jb_char(&j, '{');
    jb_key_str(&j, "model", cfg->model);
    jb_comma(&j);
    jb_key_bool(&j, "stream", 0);
    jb_comma(&j);

    /* Context window — Ollama defaults to 2048/4096 which causes hallucination */
    jb_raw(&j, "\"options\":{\"num_ctx\":32768}");
    jb_comma(&j);

    /* Messages */
    jb_raw(&j, "\"messages\":[");
    for (int i = 0; i < conv->n_msgs; i++) {
        const Message *m = &conv->msgs[i];
        if (i > 0) jb_comma(&j);
        jb_char(&j, '{');
        jb_key_str(&j, "role", m->role);
        if (m->content) {
            jb_comma(&j);
            jb_key_str(&j, "content", m->content);
        }
        /* Tool call in assistant message */
        if (m->is_tool_call) {
            jb_comma(&j);
            jb_raw(&j, "\"tool_calls\":[{");
            jb_key_str(&j, "id", m->tc_id);
            jb_comma(&j);
            jb_raw(&j, "\"type\":\"function\",\"function\":{");
            jb_key_str(&j, "name", m->tc_name);
            jb_comma(&j);
            /* Args must be raw JSON object */
            jb_raw(&j, "\"arguments\":");
            jb_raw(&j, m->tc_args ? m->tc_args : "{}");
            jb_raw(&j, "}}]");
        }
        /* Tool result message */
        if (strcmp(m->role, "tool") == 0 && m->tool_call_id[0]) {
            jb_comma(&j);
            jb_key_str(&j, "tool_call_id", m->tool_call_id);
        }
        jb_char(&j, '}');
    }
    jb_char(&j, ']');

    /* Tools (skip if model doesn't support them) */
    if (!ollama_skip_tools) {
        jb_comma(&j);
        jb_raw(&j, "\"tools\":");
        tools_json_ollama(&j);
    }

    jb_char(&j, '}');
    return buf;
}

/* Parse Ollama /api/chat response. Returns -1 in pr.is_tool_call if "not support tools" error. */
static ParsedResponse parse_response_ollama(const char *resp) {
    ParsedResponse pr = {0};

    /* Check for error response */
    char errmsg[512] = {0};
    if (jget(resp, "error", errmsg, sizeof(errmsg)) > 0) {
        if (strstr(errmsg, "does not support tools")) {
            pr.is_tool_call = -1;  /* signal: retry without tools */
            return pr;
        }
        fprintf(stderr, "[agent] ollama error: %s\n", errmsg);
        return pr;
    }

    /* Check for tool_calls in message */
    const char *tc = strstr(resp, "\"tool_calls\"");
    if (tc) {
        /* Extract function name and arguments */
        const char *func = strstr(tc, "\"function\"");
        if (func) {
            char name[64] = {0}, args[MAX_MSG_BUF] = {0};
            jget(func, "name", name, sizeof(name));
            /* Get arguments as raw JSON */
            int alen = jget_raw(func, "arguments", args, sizeof(args));
            if (name[0]) {
                pr.is_tool_call = 1;
                strncpy(pr.name, name, 63);
                pr.args = alen > 0 ? strdup(args) : strdup("{}");
                /* Generate a tool call ID */
                snprintf(pr.id, sizeof(pr.id), "tc_%08x", (unsigned)time(NULL));
                return pr;
            }
        }
    }

    /* Extract text content */
    const char *msg = strstr(resp, "\"message\"");
    if (msg) {
        char content[MAX_MSG_BUF] = {0};
        jget(msg, "content", content, sizeof(content));
        if (content[0]) {
            pr.text = strdup(content);
        }
    }

    return pr;
}

/* ── 4b: curl backend — for HTTPS APIs ── */

/* Write body to temp file, curl POST, read response, delete temp files.
 * Returns heap-allocated response body. */
static char *curl_post(const char *url, const char *body, int body_len,
                       const char *auth_header, const char *extra_header) {
    xyzt_ensure_dir(TEMP_REQ_FILE);

    /* Write request body */
    FILE *fp = fopen(TEMP_REQ_FILE, "wb");
    if (!fp) return NULL;
    fwrite(body, 1, body_len, fp);
    fclose(fp);

    /* Build curl command */
    char cmd[MAX_CMD];
    int pos = snprintf(cmd, sizeof(cmd),
        "curl -s -X POST -H \"Content-Type: application/json\"");
    if (auth_header && auth_header[0])
        pos += snprintf(cmd + pos, sizeof(cmd) - pos, " -H \"%s\"", auth_header);
    if (extra_header && extra_header[0])
        pos += snprintf(cmd + pos, sizeof(cmd) - pos, " -H \"%s\"", extra_header);
    snprintf(cmd + pos, sizeof(cmd) - pos,
        " --max-time %d -d @\"%s\" \"%s\"",
        CURL_TIMEOUT, TEMP_REQ_FILE, url);

    char *out = malloc(MAX_MSG_BUF);
    if (!out) { remove(TEMP_REQ_FILE); return NULL; }

    int rc = run_timed(cmd, out, MAX_MSG_BUF, (CURL_TIMEOUT + 5) * 1000);
    remove(TEMP_REQ_FILE);

    if (rc < 0 || out[0] == 0) { free(out); return NULL; }
    return out;
}

/* ── 4c: Request builders (Gemini, Claude, Qwen) ── */

/* Build Gemini request — POST to generativelanguage.googleapis.com */
static char *build_request_gemini(const AgentConfig *cfg, const Conversation *conv) {
    char *buf = malloc(MAX_CONV_BUF);
    if (!buf) return NULL;
    JsonBuf j;
    jb_init(&j, buf, MAX_CONV_BUF);

    jb_char(&j, '{');

    /* System instruction */
    jb_raw(&j, "\"system_instruction\":{\"parts\":[{\"text\":");
    /* Find system message */
    for (int i = 0; i < conv->n_msgs; i++) {
        if (strcmp(conv->msgs[i].role, "system") == 0 && conv->msgs[i].content) {
            jb_str(&j, conv->msgs[i].content);
            break;
        }
    }
    jb_raw(&j, "}]}");
    jb_comma(&j);

    /* Contents — messages (skip system) */
    jb_raw(&j, "\"contents\":[");
    int first = 1;
    for (int i = 0; i < conv->n_msgs; i++) {
        const Message *m = &conv->msgs[i];
        if (strcmp(m->role, "system") == 0) continue;

        if (!first) jb_comma(&j);
        first = 0;

        jb_char(&j, '{');
        /* Gemini uses "user" and "model" */
        const char *grole = "user";
        if (strcmp(m->role, "assistant") == 0) grole = "model";
        else if (strcmp(m->role, "tool") == 0) grole = "user";
        jb_key_str(&j, "role", grole);
        jb_comma(&j);

        jb_raw(&j, "\"parts\":[");
        if (strcmp(m->role, "tool") == 0) {
            /* functionResponse */
            jb_raw(&j, "{\"functionResponse\":{");
            jb_key_str(&j, "name", m->tool_name);
            jb_comma(&j);
            jb_raw(&j, "\"response\":{");
            jb_key_str(&j, "result", m->content ? m->content : "");
            jb_raw(&j, "}}}");
        } else if (m->is_tool_call) {
            /* functionCall */
            jb_raw(&j, "{\"functionCall\":{");
            jb_key_str(&j, "name", m->tc_name);
            jb_comma(&j);
            jb_raw(&j, "\"args\":");
            jb_raw(&j, m->tc_args ? m->tc_args : "{}");
            jb_raw(&j, "}}");
        } else {
            jb_raw(&j, "{\"text\":");
            jb_str(&j, m->content ? m->content : "");
            jb_char(&j, '}');
        }
        jb_char(&j, ']');
        jb_char(&j, '}');
    }
    jb_char(&j, ']');

    /* Tools */
    jb_comma(&j);
    jb_raw(&j, "\"tools\":");
    tools_json_gemini(&j);

    jb_char(&j, '}');
    return buf;
}

static char *build_request_claude(const AgentConfig *cfg, const Conversation *conv) {
    char *buf = malloc(MAX_CONV_BUF);
    if (!buf) return NULL;
    JsonBuf j;
    jb_init(&j, buf, MAX_CONV_BUF);

    jb_char(&j, '{');
    jb_key_str(&j, "model", cfg->model);
    jb_comma(&j);
    jb_key_int(&j, "max_tokens", 4096);
    jb_comma(&j);

    /* System message */
    for (int i = 0; i < conv->n_msgs; i++) {
        if (strcmp(conv->msgs[i].role, "system") == 0 && conv->msgs[i].content) {
            jb_key_str(&j, "system", conv->msgs[i].content);
            jb_comma(&j);
            break;
        }
    }

    /* Messages (skip system) */
    jb_raw(&j, "\"messages\":[");
    int first = 1;
    for (int i = 0; i < conv->n_msgs; i++) {
        const Message *m = &conv->msgs[i];
        if (strcmp(m->role, "system") == 0) continue;

        if (!first) jb_comma(&j);
        first = 0;

        jb_char(&j, '{');
        jb_key_str(&j, "role", m->role);
        jb_comma(&j);

        if (strcmp(m->role, "assistant") == 0 && m->is_tool_call) {
            /* Tool use content block */
            jb_raw(&j, "\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\"");
            jb_comma(&j);
            jb_key_str(&j, "id", m->tc_id);
            jb_comma(&j);
            jb_key_str(&j, "name", m->tc_name);
            jb_comma(&j);
            jb_raw(&j, "\"input\":");
            jb_raw(&j, m->tc_args ? m->tc_args : "{}");
            jb_raw(&j, "}]");
        } else if (strcmp(m->role, "user") == 0 && m->tool_call_id[0]) {
            /* Tool result */
            jb_raw(&j, "\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_result\"");
            jb_comma(&j);
            jb_key_str(&j, "tool_use_id", m->tool_call_id);
            jb_comma(&j);
            jb_key_str(&j, "content", m->content ? m->content : "");
            jb_raw(&j, "}]");
        } else {
            jb_key_str(&j, "content", m->content ? m->content : "");
        }

        jb_char(&j, '}');
    }
    jb_char(&j, ']');

    /* Tools */
    jb_comma(&j);
    jb_raw(&j, "\"tools\":");
    tools_json_claude(&j);

    jb_char(&j, '}');
    return buf;
}

static char *build_request_qwen(const AgentConfig *cfg, const Conversation *conv) {
    /* Qwen uses OpenAI-compatible format — same as Ollama structure */
    char *buf = malloc(MAX_CONV_BUF);
    if (!buf) return NULL;
    JsonBuf j;
    jb_init(&j, buf, MAX_CONV_BUF);

    jb_char(&j, '{');
    jb_key_str(&j, "model", cfg->model);
    jb_comma(&j);

    /* Messages */
    jb_raw(&j, "\"messages\":[");
    for (int i = 0; i < conv->n_msgs; i++) {
        const Message *m = &conv->msgs[i];
        if (i > 0) jb_comma(&j);
        jb_char(&j, '{');
        jb_key_str(&j, "role", m->role);
        if (m->content) {
            jb_comma(&j);
            jb_key_str(&j, "content", m->content);
        }
        if (m->is_tool_call) {
            jb_comma(&j);
            jb_raw(&j, "\"tool_calls\":[{");
            jb_key_str(&j, "id", m->tc_id);
            jb_comma(&j);
            jb_raw(&j, "\"type\":\"function\",\"function\":{");
            jb_key_str(&j, "name", m->tc_name);
            jb_comma(&j);
            jb_raw(&j, "\"arguments\":");
            jb_raw(&j, m->tc_args ? m->tc_args : "{}");
            jb_raw(&j, "}}]");
        }
        if (strcmp(m->role, "tool") == 0 && m->tool_call_id[0]) {
            jb_comma(&j);
            jb_key_str(&j, "tool_call_id", m->tool_call_id);
        }
        jb_char(&j, '}');
    }
    jb_char(&j, ']');

    /* Tools */
    jb_comma(&j);
    jb_raw(&j, "\"tools\":");
    tools_json_ollama(&j);  /* same format */

    jb_char(&j, '}');
    return buf;
}

/* ── 4d: Response parsers ── */

static ParsedResponse parse_response_gemini(const char *resp) {
    ParsedResponse pr = {0};

    /* Check for functionCall */
    const char *fc = strstr(resp, "\"functionCall\"");
    if (fc) {
        char name[64] = {0}, args[MAX_MSG_BUF] = {0};
        jget(fc, "name", name, sizeof(name));
        int alen = jget_raw(fc, "args", args, sizeof(args));
        if (name[0]) {
            pr.is_tool_call = 1;
            strncpy(pr.name, name, 63);
            pr.args = alen > 0 ? strdup(args) : strdup("{}");
            snprintf(pr.id, sizeof(pr.id), "tc_%08x", (unsigned)time(NULL));
            return pr;
        }
    }

    /* Extract text */
    const char *parts = strstr(resp, "\"parts\"");
    if (parts) {
        char text[MAX_MSG_BUF] = {0};
        jget(parts, "text", text, sizeof(text));
        if (text[0]) pr.text = strdup(text);
    }

    return pr;
}

static ParsedResponse parse_response_claude(const char *resp) {
    ParsedResponse pr = {0};

    /* Check for tool_use in content */
    const char *tu = strstr(resp, "\"tool_use\"");
    if (tu) {
        /* Walk backward to find the enclosing content block */
        const char *block = tu;
        /* Find name and input near this tool_use */
        char name[64] = {0}, id[64] = {0};
        /* Search forward from tool_use for name */
        const char *search = tu;
        jget(search, "name", name, sizeof(name));
        jget(search, "id", id, sizeof(id));
        if (name[0]) {
            pr.is_tool_call = 1;
            strncpy(pr.name, name, 63);
            strncpy(pr.id, id[0] ? id : "tc_claude", 63);
            char args[MAX_MSG_BUF] = {0};
            int alen = jget_raw(search, "input", args, sizeof(args));
            pr.args = alen > 0 ? strdup(args) : strdup("{}");
            return pr;
        }
    }

    /* Check stop_reason */
    char stop[64] = {0};
    jget(resp, "stop_reason", stop, sizeof(stop));
    if (strcmp(stop, "tool_use") == 0) {
        /* tool_use stop but we didn't find it above — try harder */
        const char *content = strstr(resp, "\"content\"");
        if (content) {
            char name[64] = {0}, id[64] = {0};
            jget(content, "name", name, sizeof(name));
            jget(content, "id", id, sizeof(id));
            if (name[0]) {
                pr.is_tool_call = 1;
                strncpy(pr.name, name, 63);
                strncpy(pr.id, id[0] ? id : "tc_claude", 63);
                char args[MAX_MSG_BUF] = {0};
                int alen = jget_raw(content, "input", args, sizeof(args));
                pr.args = alen > 0 ? strdup(args) : strdup("{}");
                return pr;
            }
        }
    }

    /* Extract text content */
    const char *content = strstr(resp, "\"content\"");
    if (content) {
        /* Find text block */
        const char *text_block = strstr(content, "\"text\"");
        if (text_block) {
            /* Check if this is inside a type=text block */
            char text[MAX_MSG_BUF] = {0};
            jget(text_block - 1, "text", text, sizeof(text));
            if (text[0]) pr.text = strdup(text);
        }
    }

    return pr;
}

static ParsedResponse parse_response_qwen(const char *resp) {
    /* Qwen uses OpenAI-compatible format — same logic as Ollama for tool calls */
    ParsedResponse pr = {0};

    /* Check choices[0].message.tool_calls */
    const char *choices = strstr(resp, "\"choices\"");
    if (!choices) { return pr; }

    const char *msg = strstr(choices, "\"message\"");
    if (!msg) { return pr; }

    const char *tc = strstr(msg, "\"tool_calls\"");
    if (tc) {
        const char *func = strstr(tc, "\"function\"");
        if (func) {
            char name[64] = {0}, args[MAX_MSG_BUF] = {0}, id[64] = {0};
            jget(func, "name", name, sizeof(name));
            int alen = jget_raw(func, "arguments", args, sizeof(args));
            /* Get the tool call id */
            jget(tc + 12, "id", id, sizeof(id));
            if (name[0]) {
                pr.is_tool_call = 1;
                strncpy(pr.name, name, 63);
                pr.args = alen > 0 ? strdup(args) : strdup("{}");
                strncpy(pr.id, id[0] ? id : "tc_qwen", 63);
                return pr;
            }
        }
    }

    /* Extract text */
    char content[MAX_MSG_BUF] = {0};
    jget(msg, "content", content, sizeof(content));
    if (content[0]) pr.text = strdup(content);

    return pr;
}

/* ── Unified send+parse ── */

static ParsedResponse send_request(const AgentConfig *cfg, const Conversation *conv) {
    ParsedResponse pr = {0};
    char *body = NULL;
    char *resp = NULL;

    switch (cfg->backend) {
    case BACKEND_OLLAMA: {
        body = build_request_ollama(cfg, conv);
        if (!body) return pr;
        if (cfg->verbose) fprintf(stderr, "[agent] Ollama request: %d bytes\n", (int)strlen(body));
        resp = ollama_post(body, (int)strlen(body));
        if (resp) pr = parse_response_ollama(resp);
        /* Auto-retry without tools if model doesn't support them */
        if (pr.is_tool_call == -1 && !ollama_skip_tools) {
            fprintf(stderr, "[agent] model %s doesn't support tools — retrying without\n", cfg->model);
            ollama_skip_tools = 1;
            free(body); free(resp);
            body = build_request_ollama(cfg, conv);
            if (body) {
                resp = ollama_post(body, (int)strlen(body));
                pr = (ParsedResponse){0};
                if (resp) pr = parse_response_ollama(resp);
            }
        }
        break;
    }
    case BACKEND_GEMINI: {
        body = build_request_gemini(cfg, conv);
        if (!body) return pr;
        char url[512];
        snprintf(url, sizeof(url),
            "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/%s:generateContent?key=%s",
            cfg->model, cfg->api_key);
        if (cfg->verbose) fprintf(stderr, "[agent] Gemini request: %d bytes\n", (int)strlen(body));
        resp = curl_post(url, body, (int)strlen(body), NULL, NULL);
        if (resp) pr = parse_response_gemini(resp);
        break;
    }
    case BACKEND_CLAUDE: {
        body = build_request_claude(cfg, conv);
        if (!body) return pr;
        char auth[300];
        snprintf(auth, sizeof(auth), "x-api-key: %s", cfg->api_key);
        if (cfg->verbose) fprintf(stderr, "[agent] Claude request: %d bytes\n", (int)strlen(body));
        resp = curl_post(
            "https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages",
            body, (int)strlen(body),
            auth, "anthropic-version: 2023-06-01");
        if (resp) pr = parse_response_claude(resp);
        break;
    }
    case BACKEND_OPENROUTER: {
        body = build_request_qwen(cfg, conv);  /* OpenAI-compatible format */
        if (!body) return pr;
        char auth[300];
        snprintf(auth, sizeof(auth), "Authorization: Bearer %s", cfg->api_key);
        if (cfg->verbose) fprintf(stderr, "[agent] OpenRouter request: %d bytes\n", (int)strlen(body));
        resp = curl_post(
            "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions",
            body, (int)strlen(body),
            auth, NULL);
        if (resp) pr = parse_response_qwen(resp);  /* OpenAI-compatible response */
        break;
    }
    case BACKEND_GROQ: {
        body = build_request_qwen(cfg, conv);  /* OpenAI-compatible format */
        if (!body) return pr;
        char auth[300];
        snprintf(auth, sizeof(auth), "Authorization: Bearer %s", cfg->api_key);
        if (cfg->verbose) fprintf(stderr, "[agent] Groq request: %d bytes\n", (int)strlen(body));
        resp = curl_post(
            "https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions",
            body, (int)strlen(body),
            auth, NULL);
        if (resp) pr = parse_response_qwen(resp);  /* OpenAI-compatible response */
        break;
    }
    }

    free(body);
    free(resp);
    return pr;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 * Layer 5: Role Protocols
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static const char *ROLE_PROMPTS[] = {
    /* SCOUT */
    "You are SCOUT — a fast reconnaissance agent. Your job is to explore the codebase, "
    "find relevant files, map dependencies, and report structure. "
    "Use xyzt_skel to get file skeletons, xyzt_index_find to locate symbols, "
    "xyzt_org_tree to see project structure, xyzt_map_show for dependencies. "
    "Output: structured findings as bullet points. Be thorough but concise. "
    "Register important discoveries with onetwo_known.",

    /* ANALYST */
    "You are ANALYST — a deconstruction agent. Your job is to deeply understand "
    "specific code sections. Read files carefully, trace data flow, identify patterns. "
    "Use read_file for detailed inspection, xyzt_wire_query for connections, "
    "xyzt_err_recent for past errors. "
    "Output: analysis with evidence. Quote specific lines. Identify risks.",

    /* ARCHITECT */
    "You are ARCHITECT — a first-principles design agent. Given a problem, you design "
    "the solution structure. Review existing patterns, consider constraints, propose "
    "clear interfaces. Use xyzt_skel and xyzt_map_show to understand existing architecture. "
    "Output: design document with rationale. List files to create/modify, interfaces, "
    "data structures. No implementation code — that's BUILDER's job.",

    /* BUILDER */
    "You are BUILDER — an implementation agent. Given a design, write the code. "
    "Follow existing patterns in the codebase. Use xyzt_skel to match style, "
    "xyzt_index_find to avoid duplicating existing code, read_file for context. "
    "Use write_file to create new files and patch_file to modify existing files. "
    "Use xyzt_test_run to build and test your changes. Register results with onetwo_known. "
    "Write code, then verify it compiles and passes tests.",

    /* CRITIC */
    "You are CRITIC — a code review agent. Review changes for bugs, security issues, "
    "missing error handling, inconsistencies with existing patterns. "
    "Use git_diff to see actual diffs, git_status for changed files, "
    "read_file to inspect changes, xyzt_err_recent for historical error patterns. "
    "Output: issues found with severity (critical/warning/note). Be specific — "
    "cite files and line numbers. Say 'clean' if no issues.",

    /* INTEGRATOR */
    "You are INTEGRATOR — a verification agent. Ensure everything works together. "
    "Run builds with xyzt_test_run, check that changes don't break existing functionality. "
    "Use git_status and git_diff to verify changes, "
    "xyzt_wire_query to check related files weren't missed. "
    "Output: pass/fail with evidence. List any remaining issues."
};

static const char *ROLE_NAMES[] = {
    "scout", "analyst", "architect", "builder", "critic", "integrator"
};

static Role parse_role(const char *name) {
    for (int i = 0; i < 6; i++)
        if (strcmp(name, ROLE_NAMES[i]) == 0) return (Role)i;
    return ROLE_SCOUT;  /* default */
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 * Layer 6: Agent Loop
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static void conv_add_msg(Conversation *conv, const char *role, const char *content) {
    if (conv->n_msgs >= MAX_MESSAGES) return;
    Message *m = &conv->msgs[conv->n_msgs++];
    memset(m, 0, sizeof(Message));
    strncpy(m->role, role, 15);
    m->content = content ? strdup(content) : NULL;
    conv->total_bytes += content ? (int)strlen(content) : 0;
}

static void conv_add_tool_call(Conversation *conv, const char *name, const char *args,
                               const char *id) {
    if (conv->n_msgs >= MAX_MESSAGES) return;
    Message *m = &conv->msgs[conv->n_msgs++];
    memset(m, 0, sizeof(Message));
    strncpy(m->role, "assistant", 15);
    m->is_tool_call = 1;
    strncpy(m->tc_name, name, 63);
    m->tc_args = args ? strdup(args) : strdup("{}");
    strncpy(m->tc_id, id, 63);
    conv->total_bytes += args ? (int)strlen(args) : 2;
}

static void conv_add_tool_result(Conversation *conv, const char *name, const char *id,
                                 const char *content, Backend backend) {
    if (conv->n_msgs >= MAX_MESSAGES) return;
    Message *m = &conv->msgs[conv->n_msgs++];
    memset(m, 0, sizeof(Message));
    /* Claude uses "user" role for tool results, Ollama/Qwen use "tool" */
    if (backend == BACKEND_CLAUDE)
        strncpy(m->role, "user", 15);
    else
        strncpy(m->role, "tool", 15);
    m->content = content ? strdup(content) : NULL;
    strncpy(m->tool_name, name, 63);
    strncpy(m->tool_call_id, id, 63);
    conv->total_bytes += content ? (int)strlen(content) : 0;
}

static void conv_free(Conversation *conv) {
    for (int i = 0; i < conv->n_msgs; i++) {
        free(conv->msgs[i].content);
        free(conv->msgs[i].tc_args);
    }
}

/* Compact conversation when over budget.
 * Strategy: truncate oldest tool results first, then old assistant messages.
 * After compaction, inject xyzt_resume quick so agent recalls session state. */
static void conv_enforce_limit(Conversation *conv) {
    int compacted = 0;
    int threshold = MAX_CONV_BUF * 3 / 4;  /* compact at 75% to leave headroom */

    while (conv->total_bytes > threshold && conv->n_msgs > 4) {
        int found = 0;
        /* Pass 1: truncate oldest tool results (biggest wins first) */
        for (int i = 1; i < conv->n_msgs - 4; i++) {
            Message *m = &conv->msgs[i];
            if ((strcmp(m->role, "tool") == 0 || m->tool_call_id[0]) && m->content) {
                int old_len = (int)strlen(m->content);
                if (old_len > 200) {
                    conv->total_bytes -= old_len;
                    free(m->content);
                    m->content = strdup("[compacted — use xyzt tools to re-read if needed]");
                    conv->total_bytes += 50;
                    found = 1; compacted = 1;
                }
            }
        }
        if (!found) {
            /* Pass 2: truncate old assistant text (keep last 4 messages intact) */
            for (int i = 1; i < conv->n_msgs - 4; i++) {
                Message *m = &conv->msgs[i];
                if (strcmp(m->role, "assistant") == 0 && m->content && !m->is_tool_call) {
                    int old_len = (int)strlen(m->content);
                    if (old_len > 200) {
                        conv->total_bytes -= old_len;
                        free(m->content);
                        m->content = strdup("[earlier reasoning compacted]");
                        conv->total_bytes += 30;
                        found = 1; compacted = 1;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        if (!found) break;
    }

    /* After compaction, inject a recall so the agent regains context */
    if (compacted && conv->n_msgs < MAX_MESSAGES - 2) {
        char recall[MAX_TOOL_OUT] = {0};
        run_timed("xyzt_resume quick", recall, sizeof(recall), 3000);
        if (recall[0]) {
            /* Inject as a system-ish user message so it doesn't confuse tool flow */
            conv_add_msg(conv, "user",
                "[context compacted — here's your session state]\n"
                "Some earlier tool results were truncated to save context. "
                "Use your tools to re-read anything you need.\n");
            /* Append recall as a follow-up */
            int rlen = (int)strlen(recall);
            char *ctx = malloc(rlen + 64);
            if (ctx) {
                snprintf(ctx, rlen + 64, "[session recall]\n%s", recall);
                conv_add_msg(conv, "user", ctx);
                free(ctx);
            }
        }
    }
}

/* ── v2: emit structured JSON result ── */

static void emit_json_result(const AgentResult *r, const AgentConfig *cfg) {
    char *buf = malloc(MAX_CONV_BUF);
    if (!buf) return;
    JsonBuf j;
    jb_init(&j, buf, MAX_CONV_BUF);

    jb_char(&j, '{');
    jb_key_bool(&j, "success", r->success); jb_comma(&j);
    jb_key_int(&j, "turns", r->turns_used); jb_comma(&j);
    jb_key_int(&j, "tools_called", r->tools_called); jb_comma(&j);
    jb_key_str(&j, "role", ROLE_NAMES[cfg->role]); jb_comma(&j);
    jb_key_str(&j, "model", cfg->model); jb_comma(&j);

    /* summary */
    jb_key_str(&j, "summary", r->summary ? r->summary : ""); jb_comma(&j);

    /* files_read array */
    jb_raw(&j, "\"files_read\":[");
    for (int i = 0; i < r->n_files_read; i++) {
        if (i > 0) jb_comma(&j);
        jb_str(&j, r->files_read[i]);
    }
    jb_char(&j, ']'); jb_comma(&j);

    /* writes array */
    jb_raw(&j, "\"writes\":[");
    for (int i = 0; i < r->n_writes; i++) {
        if (i > 0) jb_comma(&j);
        jb_str(&j, r->writes[i]);
    }
    jb_char(&j, ']'); jb_comma(&j);

    /* errors */
    jb_key_str(&j, "errors", r->errors);

    jb_char(&j, '}');

    printf("%s\n", buf);
    free(buf);
}

/* ── v2: read context from file or stdin ── */

static char *read_context(const AgentConfig *cfg) {
    FILE *fp = NULL;

    if (cfg->context_stdin) {
        /* Read from stdin */
        fp = stdin;
    } else if (cfg->context_file[0]) {
        fp = fopen(cfg->context_file, "rb");
        if (!fp) {
            fprintf(stderr, "[agent] Warning: cannot open context file: %s\n", cfg->context_file);
            return NULL;
        }
    } else {
        return NULL;
    }

    char *buf = malloc(MAX_CONTEXT_BUF);
    if (!buf) { if (fp != stdin) fclose(fp); return NULL; }

    int total = 0;
    while (total < MAX_CONTEXT_BUF - 1) {
        int n = (int)fread(buf + total, 1, MAX_CONTEXT_BUF - 1 - total, fp);
        if (n <= 0) break;
        total += n;
    }
    buf[total] = 0;

    if (fp != stdin) fclose(fp);
    if (total == 0) { free(buf); return NULL; }
    return buf;
}

/* ── v2: read task from file ── */

static char *read_task_file(const char *path) {
    FILE *fp = fopen(path, "rb");
    if (!fp) { fprintf(stderr, "[agent] Error: cannot open task file: %s\n", path); return NULL; }
    fseek(fp, 0, SEEK_END);
    long sz = ftell(fp);
    fseek(fp, 0, SEEK_SET);
    if (sz <= 0 || sz > 4095) {
        fprintf(stderr, "[agent] Warning: task file %ld bytes (max 4095)\n", sz);
        if (sz > 4095) sz = 4095;
    }
    char *buf = malloc(sz + 1);
    if (!buf) { fclose(fp); return NULL; }
    fread(buf, 1, sz, fp);
    buf[sz] = 0;
    fclose(fp);
    return buf;
}

static void pr_free(ParsedResponse *pr) {
    free(pr->args);
    free(pr->text);
    pr->args = NULL;
    pr->text = NULL;
}

static int agent_run(AgentConfig *cfg) {
    Conversation conv = {0};
    AgentResult result = {0};

    /* Build system message: role prompt + optional context */
    char *sys_msg = malloc(MAX_MSG_BUF);
    if (!sys_msg) return 1;
    int spos = 0;
    /* Disable thinking for qwen3 models — cuts response time from minutes to seconds */
    if (strstr(cfg->model, "qwen3"))
        spos += snprintf(sys_msg + spos, MAX_MSG_BUF - spos, "/no_think\n\n");
    spos += snprintf(sys_msg + spos, MAX_MSG_BUF - spos, "%s", ROLE_PROMPTS[cfg->role]);

    /* v2: inject context from file or stdin */
    char *ctx = read_context(cfg);
    if (ctx) {
        spos += snprintf(sys_msg + spos, MAX_MSG_BUF - spos,
                         "\n\n## Prior Context\n%s", ctx);
        free(ctx);
    }
    conv_add_msg(&conv, "system", sys_msg);
    free(sys_msg);

    /* User message: the task */
    conv_add_msg(&conv, "user", cfg->task);

    fprintf(stderr, "[agent] %s | model=%s | backend=%s | max_turns=%d%s%s\n",
            ROLE_NAMES[cfg->role], cfg->model,
            (const char *[]){"ollama","gemini","claude","openrouter","groq"}[cfg->backend],
            cfg->max_turns,
            cfg->allow_write ? " | WRITE" : "",
            cfg->json_output ? " | JSON" : "");

    int turn = 0, consecutive_empty = 0;
    while (turn < cfg->max_turns) {
        turn++;
        conv_enforce_limit(&conv);

        if (cfg->verbose) fprintf(stderr, "[agent] turn %d/%d\n", turn, cfg->max_turns);

        ParsedResponse pr = send_request(cfg, &conv);

        if (pr.is_tool_call) {
            fprintf(stderr, "[agent] tool call: %s\n", pr.name);
            result.tools_called++;
            consecutive_empty = 0;

            /* Record the tool call in conversation */
            conv_add_tool_call(&conv, pr.name, pr.args, pr.id);

            /* Execute the tool */
            char *tool_out = execute_tool(pr.name, pr.args ? pr.args : "{}",
                                          cfg->verbose, cfg->allow_write, &result);

            /* Add result to conversation */
            conv_add_tool_result(&conv, pr.name, pr.id,
                                tool_out ? tool_out : "Tool returned no output",
                                cfg->backend);
            free(tool_out);
            pr_free(&pr);
            continue;
        }

        if (pr.text) {
            /* Final text response */
            result.success = 1;
            result.turns_used = turn;
            result.summary = strdup(pr.text);

            if (cfg->json_output) {
                emit_json_result(&result, cfg);
            } else {
                printf("%s\n", pr.text);
            }
            pr_free(&pr);
            break;
        }

        /* No tool call and no text — model gave empty response */
        consecutive_empty++;
        fprintf(stderr, "[agent] empty response on turn %d (%d consecutive)\n", turn, consecutive_empty);
        pr_free(&pr);

        /* Bail out after 3 consecutive empty responses — likely connection failure */
        if (consecutive_empty >= 3) {
            fprintf(stderr, "[agent] 3 consecutive empty responses — backend unreachable or broken, aborting\n");
            result_add_error(&result, "backend unreachable: 3 consecutive empty responses");
            break;
        }

        /* Add a nudge */
        if (turn < cfg->max_turns) {
            conv_add_msg(&conv, "user",
                "You didn't provide a response or tool call. "
                "Please either call a tool to gather information, or provide your final answer.");
        }
    }

    if (!result.success) {
        result.turns_used = turn;
        if (!result.summary) {
            if (consecutive_empty >= 3)
                result.summary = strdup("[backend unreachable — aborted after 3 empty responses]");
            else if (turn >= cfg->max_turns)
                result.summary = strdup("[agent reached max turns without final answer]");
            else
                result.summary = strdup("[agent stopped without final answer]");
        }
        fprintf(stderr, "[agent] %s\n", result.summary);

        if (cfg->json_output) {
            emit_json_result(&result, cfg);
        } else {
            printf("%s\n", result.summary);
        }
    }

    free(result.summary);
    conv_free(&conv);
    return result.success ? 0 : 1;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 * Layer 7: CLI & Main
 * ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static Backend detect_backend(const char *model) {
    if (strstr(model, "gemini")) return BACKEND_GEMINI;
    if (strstr(model, "claude")) return BACKEND_CLAUDE;
    /* OpenRouter: deepseek, qwen (cloud), mistral */
    if (strstr(model, "deepseek/") || strstr(model, "qwen/") ||
        strstr(model, "mistralai/") || strstr(model, "openrouter"))
        return BACKEND_OPENROUTER;
    /* Groq: llama, mixtral on Groq infra */
    if (strstr(model, "groq/") || strstr(model, "llama-") ||
        strstr(model, "mixtral-"))
        return BACKEND_GROQ;
    /* Default: Ollama (local models including qwen3:8b, gemma, etc.) */
    return BACKEND_OLLAMA;
}

static void print_help(void) {
    printf("\n");
    printf("  xyzt_agent v2 — Multi-Model Agent Harness\n");
    printf("  ═══════════════════════════════════════════\n\n");
    printf("  Spawn agents backed by any model with full XYZT tool access.\n");
    printf("  v2: structured output, file writing, context chaining.\n\n");
    printf("  Usage:\n");
    printf("    xyzt_agent --model <model> --role <role> --task \"<task>\"\n\n");
    printf("  Options:\n");
    printf("    --model <name>        Model identifier (e.g., gemma3:4b, gemini-2.0-flash)\n");
    printf("    --role <role>         Agent role: scout, analyst, architect, builder, critic, integrator\n");
    printf("    --task \"<text>\"       Task description for the agent\n");
    printf("    --task-file <file>    Read task from file (for long tasks with code)\n");
    printf("    --backend <name>      Force backend: ollama, gemini, claude, openrouter, groq\n");
    printf("    --max-turns <n>       Max agentic turns (default: %d)\n", MAX_TURNS);
    printf("    --json                Structured JSON output (for pipeline chaining)\n");
    printf("    --allow-write         Enable write_file/patch_file tools\n");
    printf("    --context <file>      Inject prior context into system message\n");
    printf("    --context-stdin       Read context from stdin\n");
    printf("    --verbose             Show debug output on stderr\n");
    printf("    --help                Show this help\n\n");
    printf("  Auto-detect:\n");
    printf("    gemini-*             -> Google Gemini API\n");
    printf("    claude-*             -> Anthropic Claude API\n");
    printf("    deepseek/* qwen/*    -> OpenRouter (FREE)\n");
    printf("    llama-* mixtral-*    -> Groq (FREE, 300tok/s)\n");
    printf("    everything else      -> Ollama (local)\n\n");
    printf("  Pipeline example:\n");
    printf("    xyzt_agent --role scout --task \"map auth\" --json > scout.json\n");
    printf("    xyzt_agent --role builder --task-file spec.txt --context scout.json --allow-write --json\n\n");
}

int main(int argc, char *argv[]) {
    AgentConfig cfg = {0};
    cfg.max_turns = MAX_TURNS;
    strcpy(cfg.model, "qwen3:8b");   /* default — supports tool calling */
    cfg.role = ROLE_SCOUT;           /* default */
    cfg.backend = BACKEND_OLLAMA;

    /* Set shell identity */
#ifdef _WIN32
    _putenv("XYZT_SHELL_ID=xyzt-agent");
#else
    setenv("XYZT_SHELL_ID", "xyzt-agent", 1);
#endif

    int got_task = 0, got_backend = 0;

    for (int i = 1; i < argc; i++) {
        if (strcmp(argv[i], "--help") == 0 || strcmp(argv[i], "-h") == 0) {
            print_help(); return 0;
        }
        else if (strcmp(argv[i], "--model") == 0 && i + 1 < argc) {
            strncpy(cfg.model, argv[++i], 127);
        }
        else if (strcmp(argv[i], "--role") == 0 && i + 1 < argc) {
            cfg.role = parse_role(argv[++i]);
        }
        else if (strcmp(argv[i], "--task") == 0 && i + 1 < argc) {
            strncpy(cfg.task, argv[++i], sizeof(cfg.task) - 1);
            got_task = 1;
        }
        else if (strcmp(argv[i], "--backend") == 0 && i + 1 < argc) {
            i++;
            if (strcmp(argv[i], "ollama") == 0) cfg.backend = BACKEND_OLLAMA;
            else if (strcmp(argv[i], "gemini") == 0) cfg.backend = BACKEND_GEMINI;
            else if (strcmp(argv[i], "claude") == 0) cfg.backend = BACKEND_CLAUDE;
            else if (strcmp(argv[i], "openrouter") == 0) cfg.backend = BACKEND_OPENROUTER;
            else if (strcmp(argv[i], "groq") == 0) cfg.backend = BACKEND_GROQ;
            got_backend = 1;
        }
        else if (strcmp(argv[i], "--max-turns") == 0 && i + 1 < argc) {
            cfg.max_turns = atoi(argv[++i]);
            if (cfg.max_turns < 1) cfg.max_turns = 1;
            if (cfg.max_turns > 50) cfg.max_turns = 50;
        }
        else if (strcmp(argv[i], "--verbose") == 0 || strcmp(argv[i], "-v") == 0) {
            cfg.verbose = 1;
        }
        else if (strcmp(argv[i], "--json") == 0) {
            cfg.json_output = 1;
        }
        else if (strcmp(argv[i], "--allow-write") == 0) {
            cfg.allow_write = 1;
        }
        else if (strcmp(argv[i], "--context") == 0 && i + 1 < argc) {
            strncpy(cfg.context_file, argv[++i], sizeof(cfg.context_file) - 1);
        }
        else if (strcmp(argv[i], "--context-stdin") == 0) {
            cfg.context_stdin = 1;
        }
        else if (strcmp(argv[i], "--task-file") == 0 && i + 1 < argc) {
            strncpy(cfg.task_file, argv[++i], sizeof(cfg.task_file) - 1);
        }
        else {
            fprintf(stderr, "Unknown option: %s\nRun: xyzt_agent --help\n", argv[i]);
            return 1;
        }
    }

    /* v2: read task from file if specified */
    if (cfg.task_file[0]) {
        char *task_content = read_task_file(cfg.task_file);
        if (task_content) {
            strncpy(cfg.task, task_content, sizeof(cfg.task) - 1);
            free(task_content);
            got_task = 1;
        } else {
            fprintf(stderr, "Error: could not read task file: %s\n", cfg.task_file);
            return 1;
        }
    }

    if (!got_task) {
        fprintf(stderr, "Error: --task or --task-file is required.\nRun: xyzt_agent --help\n");
        return 1;
    }

    /* Auto-detect backend if not forced */
    if (!got_backend) {
        cfg.backend = detect_backend(cfg.model);
    }

    /* Load API key for non-Ollama backends — same env vars as FBC CLI */
    switch (cfg.backend) {
    case BACKEND_GEMINI: {
        const char *key = getenv("GOOGLE_API_KEY");
        if (!key || !key[0]) {
            fprintf(stderr, "Error: GOOGLE_API_KEY not set\n");
            fprintf(stderr, "Get key: https://aistudio.google.com/apikey\n");
            return 1;
        }
        strncpy(cfg.api_key, key, 255);
        break;
    }
    case BACKEND_CLAUDE: {
        const char *key = getenv("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY");
        if (!key || !key[0]) {
            fprintf(stderr, "Error: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not set\n");
            fprintf(stderr, "Get key: https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys\n");
            return 1;
        }
        strncpy(cfg.api_key, key, 255);
        break;
    }
    case BACKEND_OPENROUTER: {
        const char *key = getenv("OPENROUTER_API_KEY");
        if (!key || !key[0]) {
            fprintf(stderr, "Error: OPENROUTER_API_KEY not set\n");
            fprintf(stderr, "Get FREE key: https://openrouter.ai/keys\n");
            return 1;
        }
        strncpy(cfg.api_key, key, 255);
        break;
    }
    case BACKEND_GROQ: {
        const char *key = getenv("GROQ_API_KEY");
        if (!key || !key[0]) {
            fprintf(stderr, "Error: GROQ_API_KEY not set\n");
            fprintf(stderr, "Get FREE key: https://console.groq.com/keys\n");
            return 1;
        }
        strncpy(cfg.api_key, key, 255);
        break;
    }
    case BACKEND_OLLAMA:
        break;  /* no key needed */
    }

    /* Init winsock for Ollama */
    if (cfg.backend == BACKEND_OLLAMA) {
        net_init();
    }

    int rc = agent_run(&cfg);

    if (cfg.backend == BACKEND_OLLAMA) {
        net_cleanup();
    }

    return rc;
}
/*
 * xyzt_diff.c — Git-Aware Delta
 *
 * Queries git for structured deltas, links changed files
 * to the current onetwo problem via wire.
 *
 * Isaac & Claude — February 2026
 */

#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>
#include <stdint.h>
#include "wire.h"

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   Constants
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

#define PATH_LEN    256
#define LINE_LEN    1024
#define BUF_SIZE    65536
#define SNAP_PATH   ".xyzt/diff_snapshot"

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   Git helpers
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static int git_available(void) {
    int rc = system("git --version >nul 2>nul");
    return rc == 0;
}

static int in_git_repo(void) {
    int rc = system("git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >nul 2>nul");
    return rc == 0;
}

static char *git_exec(const char *cmd) {
    FILE *fp = _popen(cmd, "r");
    if (!fp) return NULL;
    char *buf = calloc(1, BUF_SIZE);
    size_t total = 0;
    char line[LINE_LEN];
    while (fgets(line, sizeof(line), fp)) {
        size_t len = strlen(line);
        if (total + len < BUF_SIZE - 1) {
            memcpy(buf + total, line, len);
            total += len;
        }
    }
    buf[total] = '\0';
    _pclose(fp);
    return buf;
}

/* Read snapshot commit hash if it exists */
static int read_snapshot(char *out, int maxlen) {
    FILE *fp = fopen(SNAP_PATH, "r");
    if (!fp) return -1;
    if (!fgets(out, maxlen, fp)) { fclose(fp); return -1; }
    fclose(fp);
    /* Strip newline */
    char *nl = strchr(out, '\n');
    if (nl) *nl = '\0';
    char *cr = strchr(out, '\r');
    if (cr) *cr = '\0';
    if (strlen(out) < 6) return -1;
    return 0;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   Commands
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static void cmd_status(void) {
    if (!git_available()) { printf("git not found.\n"); return; }
    if (!in_git_repo()) { printf("Not a git repository.\n"); return; }

    char *porcelain = git_exec("git status --porcelain=v1 2>nul");
    char *diffstat = git_exec("git diff --stat 2>nul");
    if (!porcelain) { printf("git status failed.\n"); return; }

    /* Parse porcelain output */
    typedef struct { char status[4]; char path[PATH_LEN]; int adds; int dels; } Entry;
    Entry *modified = (Entry*)calloc(256, sizeof(Entry));
    Entry *added = (Entry*)calloc(256, sizeof(Entry));
    Entry *deleted = (Entry*)calloc(256, sizeof(Entry));
    Entry *untracked = (Entry*)calloc(256, sizeof(Entry));
    int n_mod = 0, n_add = 0, n_del = 0, n_unt = 0;

    char *line = porcelain;
    while (*line) {
        char *nl = strchr(line, '\n');
        if (nl) *nl = '\0';
        if (strlen(line) < 4) { if (nl) { line = nl + 1; continue; } else break; }

        char x = line[0], y = line[1];
        char *path = line + 3;

        if (x == '?' && y == '?') {
            if (n_unt < 256) { strncpy(untracked[n_unt].path, path, PATH_LEN - 1); n_unt++; }
        } else if (x == 'A' || y == 'A') {
            if (n_add < 256) { strncpy(added[n_add].path, path, PATH_LEN - 1); n_add++; }
        } else if (x == 'D' || y == 'D') {
            if (n_del < 256) { strncpy(deleted[n_del].path, path, PATH_LEN - 1); n_del++; }
        } else if (x == 'M' || y == 'M') {
            if (n_mod < 256) { strncpy(modified[n_mod].path, path, PATH_LEN - 1); n_mod++; }
        }

        if (nl) line = nl + 1; else break;
    }

    /* Parse diffstat for +/- counts */
    if (diffstat) {
        char *dl = diffstat;
        while (*dl) {
            char *dnl = strchr(dl, '\n');
            if (dnl) *dnl = '\0';
            /* Format: " file.c | 42 ++----" */
            char *pipe = strchr(dl, '|');
            if (pipe) {
                /* Extract filename */
                char fname[PATH_LEN] = "";
                char *fs = dl;
                while (*fs == ' ') fs++;
                int flen = (int)(pipe - fs);
                while (flen > 0 && fs[flen - 1] == ' ') flen--;
                if (flen > 0 && flen < PATH_LEN) { strncpy(fname, fs, flen); fname[flen] = '\0'; }

                /* Count + and - after the pipe */
                int adds = 0, dels = 0;
                for (char *c = pipe; *c; c++) {
                    if (*c == '+') adds++;
                    if (*c == '-') dels++;
                }

                /* Match to modified entries */
                for (int i = 0; i < n_mod; i++) {
                    if (strcmp(modified[i].path, fname) == 0 ||
                        (strrchr(modified[i].path, '/') && strcmp(strrchr(modified[i].path, '/') + 1, fname) == 0)) {
                        modified[i].adds = adds;
                        modified[i].dels = dels;
                    }
                }
            }
            if (dnl) dl = dnl + 1; else break;
        }
    }

    /* Wire integration: auto-link modified and added files */
    int linked = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < n_mod; i++) if (wire_auto_link(modified[i].path)) linked++;
    for (int i = 0; i < n_add; i++) if (wire_auto_link(added[i].path)) linked++;

    /* Output */
    printf("---XYZT-DIFF-STATUS---\n");
    printf("modified: %d\n", n_mod);
    for (int i = 0; i < n_mod; i++) {
        if (modified[i].adds || modified[i].dels)
            printf("  %s (+%d -%d)\n", modified[i].path, modified[i].adds, modified[i].dels);
        else
            printf("  %s\n", modified[i].path);
    }
    printf("added: %d\n", n_add);
    for (int i = 0; i < n_add; i++) printf("  %s\n", added[i].path);
    printf("deleted: %d\n", n_del);
    for (int i = 0; i < n_del; i++) printf("  %s\n", deleted[i].path);
    printf("untracked: %d\n", n_unt);
    for (int i = 0; i < n_unt; i++) printf("  %s\n", untracked[i].path);
    if (linked > 0) printf("wire: %d files linked to active problem\n", linked);
    printf("---END-STATUS---\n");

    free(porcelain);
    if (diffstat) free(diffstat);
    free(modified); free(added); free(deleted); free(untracked);
}

static void cmd_since(const char *ref) {
    if (!git_available()) { printf("git not found.\n"); return; }
    if (!in_git_repo()) { printf("Not a git repository.\n"); return; }

    char snap[128] = "";
    char base[128] = "";

    if (ref) {
        strncpy(base, ref, 127);
    } else if (read_snapshot(snap, 128) == 0) {
        strncpy(base, snap, 127);
    } else {
        strncpy(base, "HEAD~5", 127);  /* fallback */
    }

    char cmd_stat[512], cmd_names[512];
    snprintf(cmd_stat, sizeof(cmd_stat), "git diff --stat %s..HEAD 2>nul", base);
    snprintf(cmd_names, sizeof(cmd_names), "git diff --name-status %s..HEAD 2>nul", base);

    char *stat_out = git_exec(cmd_stat);
    char *names_out = git_exec(cmd_names);

    printf("---XYZT-DIFF-SINCE---\n");
    printf("base: %s\n", base);

    /* Parse name-status and auto-link */
    int linked = 0;
    if (names_out) {
        char *line = names_out;
        while (*line) {
            char *nl = strchr(line, '\n');
            if (nl) *nl = '\0';
            if (strlen(line) >= 3) {
                char *path = line + 2;
                while (*path == '\t' || *path == ' ') path++;
                if (*path) {
                    printf("  %c %s\n", line[0], path);
                    if (wire_auto_link(path)) linked++;
                }
            }
            if (nl) line = nl + 1; else break;
        }
    }

    if (stat_out) {
        printf("\nstat:\n");
        /* Print stat output */
        char *line = stat_out;
        while (*line) {
            char *nl = strchr(line, '\n');
            if (nl) *nl = '\0';
            if (strlen(line) > 0) printf("  %s\n", line);
            if (nl) line = nl + 1; else break;
        }
    }

    if (linked > 0) printf("wire: %d files linked to active problem\n", linked);
    printf("---END-SINCE---\n");

    if (stat_out) free(stat_out);
    if (names_out) free(names_out);
}

static void cmd_file(const char *path) {
    if (!git_available()) { printf("git not found.\n"); return; }
    if (!in_git_repo()) { printf("Not a git repository.\n"); return; }

    char cmd[512];
    snprintf(cmd, sizeof(cmd), "git diff -- \"%s\" 2>nul", path);
    char *diff = git_exec(cmd);

    printf("---XYZT-DIFF-FILE---\n");
    printf("file: %s\n", path);
    if (diff && strlen(diff) > 0) {
        /* Count additions and deletions */
        int adds = 0, dels = 0;
        char *line = diff;
        while (*line) {
            char *nl = strchr(line, '\n');
            if (line[0] == '+' && line[1] != '+') adds++;
            if (line[0] == '-' && line[1] != '-') dels++;
            if (nl) line = nl + 1; else break;
        }
        printf("changes: +%d -%d\n\n", adds, dels);
        printf("%s", diff);
    } else {
        printf("(no changes)\n");
    }
    printf("---END-DIFF-FILE---\n");

    if (diff) free(diff);
}

static void cmd_snapshot(void) {
    if (!git_available()) { printf("git not found.\n"); return; }
    if (!in_git_repo()) { printf("Not a git repository.\n"); return; }

    char *hash = git_exec("git rev-parse HEAD 2>nul");
    if (!hash || strlen(hash) < 6) { printf("Failed to get HEAD.\n"); if (hash) free(hash); return; }

    /* Strip newline */
    char *nl = strchr(hash, '\n');
    if (nl) *nl = '\0';

    xyzt_ensure_dir(SNAP_PATH);
    FILE *fp = fopen(SNAP_PATH, "w");
    if (!fp) { printf("Cannot write snapshot.\n"); free(hash); return; }
    fprintf(fp, "%s\n", hash);
    fclose(fp);

    printf("---XYZT-DIFF-SNAPSHOT---\n");
    printf("saved: %s\n", hash);
    printf("---END-SNAPSHOT---\n");

    free(hash);
}

static void cmd_brief(void) {
    if (!git_available()) { printf("git not found.\n"); return; }
    if (!in_git_repo()) { printf("Not a git repository.\n"); return; }

    char *porcelain = git_exec("git status --porcelain=v1 2>nul");
    if (!porcelain) { printf("---XYZT-DIFF-BRIEF---\nerror\n---END-BRIEF---\n"); return; }

    int mod = 0, add = 0, del = 0, unt = 0;
    char *line = porcelain;
    while (*line) {
        char *nl = strchr(line, '\n');
        if (nl) *nl = '\0';
        if (strlen(line) >= 3) {
            char x = line[0], y = line[1];
            if (x == '?' && y == '?') unt++;
            else if (x == 'A' || y == 'A') add++;
            else if (x == 'D' || y == 'D') del++;
            else if (x == 'M' || y == 'M') mod++;
        }
        if (nl) line = nl + 1; else break;
    }

    printf("---XYZT-DIFF-BRIEF---\n");
    printf("modified: %d  added: %d  deleted: %d  untracked: %d\n", mod, add, del, unt);

    char snap[128];
    if (read_snapshot(snap, 128) == 0)
        printf("snapshot: %s\n", snap);
    else
        printf("snapshot: (none)\n");

    printf("---END-BRIEF---\n");
    free(porcelain);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   Main
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static void usage(void) {
    printf("XYZT DIFF — Git-Aware Delta\n\n");
    printf("  xyzt_diff status             Structured git status\n");
    printf("  xyzt_diff since [ref]        Changes since ref or last snapshot\n");
    printf("  xyzt_diff file <path>        Diff for specific file\n");
    printf("  xyzt_diff snapshot           Save current HEAD as reference\n");
    printf("  xyzt_diff brief              Machine-readable summary\n");
    printf("\nSnapshot: .xyzt/diff_snapshot\n");
    printf("\nIsaac & Claude — February 2026\n");
}

int main(int argc, char **argv) {
    if (argc < 2) { usage(); return 0; }
    const char *cmd = argv[1];
    if (strcmp(cmd, "status") == 0)          cmd_status();
    else if (strcmp(cmd, "since") == 0)      cmd_since(argc >= 3 ? argv[2] : NULL);
    else if (strcmp(cmd, "file") == 0 && argc >= 3) cmd_file(argv[2]);
    else if (strcmp(cmd, "snapshot") == 0)   cmd_snapshot();
    else if (strcmp(cmd, "brief") == 0)      cmd_brief();
    else { usage(); return 1; }
    return 0;
}
/*
 * xyzt_embed.c — Semantic Embedding Tool via Ollama qwen3-embedding
 * 
 * Commands:
 *   xyzt_embed store <file>   — Embed a file, store in .xyzt/embeddings.bin
 *   xyzt_embed query <file>   — Find top 5 similar files by cosine distance
 *   xyzt_embed batch          — Embed all files in session.bin
 *   xyzt_embed list           — List all stored embeddings
 *
 * Architecture:
 *   - Raw socket HTTP to Ollama (same as xyzt_agent.c ollama_post)
 *   - Storage: {path[256], vector[float*N], timestamp} in .xyzt/embeddings.bin
 *   - Cosine similarity: dot(a,b) / (|a| * |b|)
 */

#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>
#include <stdint.h>
#include <time.h>
#include <math.h>

#ifdef _WIN32
#include <winsock2.h>
#include <ws2tcpip.h>
#include <direct.h>
#define mkdir_p(d) _mkdir(d)
#else
#include <unistd.h>
#include <sys/socket.h>
#include <netinet/in.h>
#include <arpa/inet.h>
#include <sys/stat.h>
#define mkdir_p(d) mkdir(d, 0755)
#define closesocket(s) close(s)
#define SOCKET int
#define INVALID_SOCKET -1
#endif

#include "wire.h"

/* =============================================================================
 * Constants
 * ============================================================================= */

#define OLLAMA_HOST     "127.0.0.1"
#define OLLAMA_PORT     11434
#define EMBED_MODEL     "qwen3-embedding"
#define MAX_EMBED_DIM   4096       /* qwen3-embedding output dimension */
#ifndef MAX_PATH
#define MAX_PATH        256
#endif
#define MAX_FILES       512
#define EMBEDDINGS_FILE ".xyzt/embeddings.bin"

/* =============================================================================
 * Data Structures
 * ============================================================================= */

typedef struct {
    char     path[MAX_PATH];
    float    vector[MAX_EMBED_DIM];
    int      dim;
    uint64_t timestamp;
} Embedding;

typedef struct {
    uint32_t   magic;      /* 0x454D4244 = "EMBD" */
    uint8_t    version;
    uint8_t    _pad[3];
    uint32_t   count;
    uint32_t   dim;        /* embedding dimension */
    uint32_t   _reserved;
    Embedding  entries[MAX_FILES];
} EmbeddingStore;

#define EMBED_MAGIC 0x454D4244

/* =============================================================================
 * Network: HTTP POST to Ollama (mirrors xyzt_agent.c:893-975)
 * ============================================================================= */

static int net_init_done = 0;

static void net_init(void) {
    if (net_init_done) return;
#ifdef _WIN32
    WSADATA wsa;
    WSAStartup(MAKEWORD(2, 2), &wsa);
#endif
    net_init_done = 1;
}

static void net_cleanup(void) {
#ifdef _WIN32
    WSACleanup();
#endif
}

/* POST to Ollama embeddings API, return JSON response */
static char *ollama_embed(const char *input, int *out_len) {
    net_init();
    if (out_len) *out_len = 0;

    /* Build JSON body — heap alloc, stack can't handle 256KB on Windows */
    int input_len = (int)strlen(input);
    int body_max = input_len + 512;
    char *body = malloc(body_max);
    if (!body) return NULL;
    int body_len = snprintf(body, body_max,
        "{\"model\":\"%s\",\"input\":\"%.*s\",\"options\":{\"num_ctx\":8192}}",
        EMBED_MODEL, input_len, input);

    SOCKET sock = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, IPPROTO_TCP);
    if (sock == INVALID_SOCKET) { free(body); return NULL; }

    struct sockaddr_in addr;
    memset(&addr, 0, sizeof(addr));
    addr.sin_family = AF_INET;
    addr.sin_port = htons(OLLAMA_PORT);
    inet_pton(AF_INET, OLLAMA_HOST, &addr.sin_addr);

    if (connect(sock, (struct sockaddr *)&addr, sizeof(addr)) != 0) {
        fprintf(stderr, "[embed] Cannot connect to Ollama at %s:%d\n", OLLAMA_HOST, OLLAMA_PORT);
        free(body); closesocket(sock);
        return NULL;
    }

    char header[512];
    snprintf(header, sizeof(header),
        "POST /api/embed HTTP/1.1\r\n"
        "Host: %s:%d\r\n"
        "Content-Type: application/json\r\n"
        "Content-Length: %d\r\n"
        "Connection: close\r\n"
        "\r\n",
        OLLAMA_HOST, OLLAMA_PORT, body_len);

    send(sock, header, (int)strlen(header), 0);
    send(sock, body, body_len, 0);
    free(body);

    /* Read response */
    int resp_max = 1048576;  /* 1MB for embedding response */
    char *resp = malloc(resp_max);
    if (!resp) {
        closesocket(sock);
        return NULL;
    }
    int total = 0;
    while (total < resp_max - 1) {
        int n = recv(sock, resp + total, resp_max - 1 - total, 0);
        if (n <= 0) break;
        total += n;
    }
    resp[total] = 0;
    if (out_len) *out_len = total;

    closesocket(sock);

    /* Skip HTTP header */
    char *body_start = strstr(resp, "\r\n\r\n");
    if (!body_start) {
        fprintf(stderr, "[embed] No HTTP header in %d bytes\n", total);
        free(resp);
        return NULL;
    }
    body_start += 4;
    int body_size = total - (int)(body_start - resp);
    memmove(resp, body_start, body_size);
    resp[body_size] = 0;

    return resp;
}

/* =============================================================================
 * JSON Parsing (simplified, mirrors xyzt_agent.c jget)
 * ============================================================================= */

static int jget(const char *json, const char *key, char *out, int max) {
    const char *k = strstr(json, key);
    if (!k) { out[0] = 0; return 0; }
    const char *v = strchr(k, ':');
    if (!v) { out[0] = 0; return 0; }
    v++;
    while (*v == ' ' || *v == '"') v++;
    int i = 0;
    while (*v && *v != '"' && *v != ',' && *v != '}' && i < max - 1) {
        out[i++] = *v++;
    }
    out[i] = 0;
    return i;
}

/* Parse embedding vector from JSON: {"embeddings":[[0.1,0.2,...]]} */
static int parse_embeddings(const char *json, float *out, int max_dim) {
    const char *emb = strstr(json, "\"embeddings\"");
    if (!emb) return 0;
    const char *arr = strchr(emb, '[');
    if (!arr) return 0;
    arr = strchr(arr + 1, '[');  /* Skip outer array, get first embedding */
    if (!arr) return 0;
    arr++;

    int count = 0;
    while (*arr && count < max_dim) {
        while (*arr == ' ' || *arr == ',' || *arr == '\n' || *arr == '\r') arr++;
        if (*arr == ']' || *arr == 0) break;
        if (*arr == '-' || (*arr >= '0' && *arr <= '9') || *arr == '.') {
            char num[64];
            int i = 0;
            while ((*arr == '-' || *arr == '+' || *arr == '.' || *arr == 'e' || *arr == 'E' ||
                    (*arr >= '0' && *arr <= '9')) && i < 63) {
                num[i++] = *arr++;
            }
            num[i] = 0;
            out[count++] = (float)atof(num);
        } else {
            arr++;
        }
    }
    return count;
}

/* =============================================================================
 * File Reading
 * ============================================================================= */

static char *read_file_content(const char *path, size_t *out_len) {
    FILE *f = fopen(path, "rb");
    if (!f) return NULL;

    fseek(f, 0, SEEK_END);
    long len = ftell(f);
    fseek(f, 0, SEEK_SET);

    if (len <= 0 || len > 2000000) {  /* 2MB max */
        fclose(f);
        return NULL;
    }

    char *buf = malloc(len + 1);
    if (!buf) {
        fclose(f);
        return NULL;
    }

    size_t n = fread(buf, 1, len, f);
    buf[n] = 0;
    fclose(f);

    if (out_len) *out_len = n;
    return buf;
}

/* =============================================================================
 * Embedding Store I/O
 * ============================================================================= */

static void ensure_xyzt_dir(void) {
    mkdir_p(".xyzt");
}

static EmbeddingStore *store_load(void) {
    FILE *f = fopen(EMBEDDINGS_FILE, "rb");
    if (!f) return NULL;

    EmbeddingStore *s = malloc(sizeof(EmbeddingStore));
    if (fread(s, sizeof(EmbeddingStore), 1, f) != 1 || s->magic != EMBED_MAGIC) {
        free(s);
        fclose(f);
        return NULL;
    }
    fclose(f);
    return s;
}

static void store_save(const EmbeddingStore *s) {
    ensure_xyzt_dir();
    FILE *f = fopen(EMBEDDINGS_FILE, "wb");
    if (!f) {
        fprintf(stderr, "[embed] Cannot write %s\n", EMBEDDINGS_FILE);
        return;
    }
    fwrite(s, sizeof(EmbeddingStore), 1, f);
    fclose(f);
}

static EmbeddingStore *store_create(void) {
    EmbeddingStore *s = calloc(1, sizeof(EmbeddingStore));
    s->magic = EMBED_MAGIC;
    s->version = 1;
    s->count = 0;
    s->dim = MAX_EMBED_DIM;
    return s;
}

/* =============================================================================
 * Cosine Similarity
 * ============================================================================= */

static float dot_product(const float *a, const float *b, int n) {
    float sum = 0.0f;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        sum += a[i] * b[i];
    }
    return sum;
}

static float magnitude(const float *a, int n) {
    float sum = 0.0f;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        sum += a[i] * a[i];
    }
    return sqrtf(sum);
}

static float cosine_similarity(const float *a, const float *b, int n) {
    float dot = dot_product(a, b, n);
    float mag_a = magnitude(a, n);
    float mag_b = magnitude(b, n);
    if (mag_a < 1e-6f || mag_b < 1e-6f) return 0.0f;
    return dot / (mag_a * mag_b);
}

/* =============================================================================
 * Commands
 * ============================================================================= */

static void cmd_store(const char *file_path) {
    /* Read file */
    size_t len = 0;
    char *content = read_file_content(file_path, &len);
    if (!content) {
        fprintf(stderr, "[embed] Cannot read %s\n", file_path);
        return;
    }

    /* Debug: show first 200 chars */
    fprintf(stderr, "[embed] Input preview: %.*s...\n", (int)(len < 200 ? len : 200), content);

    /* Escape newlines for JSON */
    char *escaped = malloc(len * 2 + 1);
    int j = 0;
    for (size_t i = 0; i < len; i++) {
        if (content[i] == '\n') {
            escaped[j++] = '\\';
            escaped[j++] = 'n';
        } else if (content[i] == '\r') {
            escaped[j++] = '\\';
            escaped[j++] = 'r';
        } else if (content[i] == '"') {
            escaped[j++] = '\\';
            escaped[j++] = '"';
        } else if (content[i] == '\\') {
            escaped[j++] = '\\';
            escaped[j++] = '\\';
        } else {
            escaped[j++] = content[i];
        }
    }
    escaped[j] = 0;
    free(content);

    /* Call Ollama */
    int resp_len = 0;
    char *resp = ollama_embed(escaped, &resp_len);
    free(escaped);

    if (!resp) {
        fprintf(stderr, "[embed] Ollama request failed\n");
        return;
    }

    /* Debug: show response preview */
    fprintf(stderr, "[embed] Response preview: %.*s...\n", (int)(resp_len < 500 ? resp_len : 500), resp);

    /* Parse embeddings */
    Embedding emb;
    memset(&emb, 0, sizeof(emb));
    strncpy(emb.path, file_path, MAX_PATH - 1);
    emb.dim = parse_embeddings(resp, emb.vector, MAX_EMBED_DIM);
    emb.timestamp = (uint64_t)time(NULL);
    free(resp);

    if (emb.dim == 0) {
        fprintf(stderr, "[embed] Failed to parse embeddings from response\n");
        return;
    }

    /* Store */
    EmbeddingStore *store = store_load();
    if (!store) store = store_create();

    /* Check if already exists, update if so */
    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < store->count; i++) {
        if (strcmp(store->entries[i].path, file_path) == 0) {
            store->entries[i] = emb;
            printf("[embed] Updated %s (%d dims)\n", file_path, emb.dim);
            store_save(store);
            free(store);
            return;
        }
    }

    /* Add new */
    if (store->count >= MAX_FILES) {
        fprintf(stderr, "[embed] Store full (%d files)\n", MAX_FILES);
        free(store);
        return;
    }
    store->entries[store->count++] = emb;
    printf("[embed] Stored %s (%d dims)\n", file_path, emb.dim);
    store_save(store);
    free(store);
}

static void cmd_query(const char *file_path, int top_n) {
