        fwrite(host_mask_buffer.data(), 1, raw_count, stdout);
        fflush(stdout); // Push electrons down the wire
    }

    // --- LAYER 3: CRYSTALLIZE (XOR mode only, ngram handled above) ---
    if (clean_count > 0) {
        {
            // XOR-based crystallization
            cudaMemsetAsync(state.d_batch_xor, 0, sizeof(uint32_t), stream);
            cudaMemsetAsync(state.d_batch_pot, 0, sizeof(float), stream);

            ob1_reduce_tokens<<<256, 256, 0, stream>>>(
                d_clean_tokens, (uint32_t)clean_count,
                state.d_batch_xor, state.d_batch_pot,
                256,  // vocab_size
                state.d_feedback  // feedback accumulator
            );

            int update_blocks = (state.num_nodes + 255) / 256;
            ob1_update_lattice<<<update_blocks, 256, 0, stream>>>(
                state.d_state, state.d_batch_xor, state.d_batch_pot
            );

            // THE OBSERVER: Check for crystallization (memory formation)
            int crystal_blocks = (clean_count + 255) / 256;
            ob1_check_crystallization<<<crystal_blocks, 256, 0, stream>>>(
                d_clean_tokens, (uint32_t)clean_count, state.d_state
            );

            cudaMemsetAsync(state.d_feedback, 0, sizeof(uint32_t), stream);
            ob1_lattice_reduce<<<update_blocks, 256, 0, stream>>>(
                state.d_state, state.d_feedback
            );
        }
    }

    state.buffer_fill[state.current_buffer] = 0;
}

// =============================================================================
// GRAVITY FEED (STDIN PIPE)
// =============================================================================

void run_pipe_mode() {
    // 1. Set Binary Mode
    #ifdef _WIN32
    _setmode(_fileno(stdin), _O_BINARY);
    _setmode(_fileno(stdout), _O_BINARY);
    #endif

    // 2. The Loop
    // Use host pinned memory for max PCIe throughput
    uint32_t* host_pinned;
    cudaMallocHost(&host_pinned, state.buffer_size * sizeof(uint32_t));

    // We read chunk by chunk
    // 25MB chunks (6.5M words)
    const size_t CHUNK_SIZE_BYTES = 25 * 1024 * 1024;

    while (true) {
        // A. Read from Pipe
        std::cin.read((char*)host_pinned, CHUNK_SIZE_BYTES);
        std::streamsize bytes_read = std::cin.gcount();

        if (bytes_read <= 0) break;

        // B. Push to GPU
        uint32_t words = bytes_read / sizeof(uint32_t);
        if (words == 0) continue;

        {
            std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(state_mutex);
            cudaMemcpyAsync(state.d_buffer, host_pinned, bytes_read, cudaMemcpyHostToDevice, stream);
            state.buffer_fill[0] = words;
        }

        // C. Trigger Cascade (Writes to stdout internally)
        flush_buffer();
    }

    cudaFreeHost(host_pinned);
}

// =============================================================================
// MAIN ENTRY
// =============================================================================

int main(int argc, char** argv) {
    // Parse Flags
    for(int i=1; i<argc; i++) {
        if(std::string(argv[i]) == "--pipe") is_pipe_mode = true;
        if(std::string(argv[i]) == "--nofbc") use_fbc_mode = false;
        if(std::string(argv[i]) == "--nongram") use_ngram_mode = false;
        if(std::string(argv[i]) == "--xor") use_ngram_mode = false;  // Alias
        if(std::string(argv[i]) == "--model" && i+1 < argc) {
            model_path = argv[++i];
            inference_mode = true;
        }
    }

    // Init Engine
    cudaStreamCreate(&stream);
    init_iron_engine(state, 4096);

    // Init N-Gram State (NEW)
    h_ngram_state.num_nodes = 4096;
    cudaMalloc(&h_ngram_state.last_ngram, 4096 * sizeof(uint32_t));
    cudaMalloc(&h_ngram_state.repetition_count, 4096 * sizeof(uint32_t));
    cudaMalloc(&h_ngram_state.node_locked, 4096 * sizeof(uint8_t));
    cudaMalloc(&h_ngram_state.d_total_repetitions, sizeof(uint32_t));
    cudaMalloc(&h_ngram_state.d_locked_count, sizeof(uint32_t));

    cudaMemset(h_ngram_state.last_ngram, 0, 4096 * sizeof(uint32_t));
    cudaMemset(h_ngram_state.repetition_count, 0, 4096 * sizeof(uint32_t));
    cudaMemset(h_ngram_state.node_locked, 0, 4096 * sizeof(uint8_t));
    cudaMemset(h_ngram_state.d_total_repetitions, 0, sizeof(uint32_t));
    cudaMemset(h_ngram_state.d_locked_count, 0, sizeof(uint32_t));

    cudaMalloc(&d_ngram_state, sizeof(NGramState));
    cudaMemcpy(d_ngram_state, &h_ngram_state, sizeof(NGramState), cudaMemcpyHostToDevice);

    // ONETWO pre-allocated buffer pool (eliminates per-call cudaMalloc)
    onetwo_buffers_init(&onetwo_bufs);
    printf("[INIT] OneTwoBuffers allocated: %d MB max tokens, pinned host + async stream\n",
           ONETWO_MAX_TOKENS / (1024*1024));

    // IRON Multi-Projection Fingerprint
    cudaMalloc(&d_fingerprint, sizeof(IronFingerprint));
    cudaMemset(d_fingerprint, 0, sizeof(IronFingerprint));

    // IRON Multi-Scale Fingerprint (Layer 1)
    cudaMalloc(&d_multiscale, sizeof(IronMultiScale));
    cudaMemset(d_multiscale, 0, sizeof(IronMultiScale));

    // XYZT Bridge (Layer 3 - Crystallization)
    bridge_init(&g_bridge);

    // Load inference model if --model specified
    if (inference_mode) {
        printf("[INFERENCE] Loading model: %s\n", model_path.c_str());
        loaded_model = new OB1Model();
        if (!loaded_model->load(model_path.c_str())) {
            printf("[INFERENCE] FATAL: Failed to load model\n");
            return 1;
        }
        inference_engine = new InferenceEngine();
        if (!inference_engine->init(*loaded_model)) {
            printf("[INFERENCE] FATAL: Failed to init inference engine\n");
            return 1;
        }
        printf("[INFERENCE] Model loaded and ready\n");
    }

    // Alloc Buffers
    cudaMalloc(&d_e6_state, 6 * sizeof(uint32_t));
    cudaMemset(d_e6_state, 0, 6 * sizeof(uint32_t));

    // Seed E6 with primes (geometric bootstrap)
    uint32_t e6_init[6] = {5, 7, 11, 13, 17, 19};
    cudaMemcpy(d_e6_state, e6_init, 6 * sizeof(uint32_t), cudaMemcpyHostToDevice);

    cudaMalloc(&d_filter_mask, state.buffer_size * sizeof(uint8_t));
    cudaMalloc(&d_clean_tokens, state.buffer_size * sizeof(uint32_t));
    cudaMalloc(&d_clean_counter, sizeof(uint32_t));
    cudaMalloc(&d_probe_results, 256 * sizeof(float));

    if (is_pipe_mode) {
        // GRAVITY MODE
        // No text output, only binary mask to stdout
        run_pipe_mode();
    } else {
        // API MODE (Control Plane)
        std::cout << "========================================" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  0B-1 IRON PYRAMID SERVER" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  E6 Filter -> E8 Crystal Cascade" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "========================================" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "[E6] Fast gate: primes {5,7,11,13,17,19}" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "[FBC] " << (use_fbc_mode ? "Hyper-Sieve" : "Standard") << std::endl;
        std::cout << "[DETECT] " << (use_ngram_mode ? "N-GRAM REPETITION (60x English signal)" : "XOR Accumulation") << std::endl;
        std::cout << std::endl;
        std::cout << "Usage:" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  ob1_server.exe           # API mode on :8080 (ngram)" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  ob1_server.exe --xor     # Use XOR mode instead" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  ob1_server.exe --pipe    # Gravity mode (stdin->stdout)" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  ob1_server.exe --nofbc   # Disable FBC mode" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  ob1_server.exe --model models/qwen3_0.6b.0b1  # Load inference model" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "========================================" << std::endl;

        crow::SimpleApp app;

        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/feed").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)
        ([&](const crow::request& req) {
            std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(state_mutex);
            uint32_t bytes = req.body.size();

            if (state.buffer_fill[0] * 4 + bytes > state.buffer_size * 4) {
                state_mutex.unlock();
                flush_buffer();
                state_mutex.lock();
            }

            cudaMemcpyAsync(((char*)state.d_buffer) + state.buffer_fill[0]*4,
                req.body.data(), bytes, cudaMemcpyHostToDevice, stream);
            state.buffer_fill[0] += bytes / 4;

            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["status"] = "buffered";
            res["words"] = (int)(bytes / 4);
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/flush").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)([&](){
            flush_buffer();
            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["status"] = "flushed";
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/probe_vocab").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Get)([&](){
            ob1_probe_vocab<<<256, 256, 0, stream>>>(state.d_state, state.d_feedback, d_probe_results);
            cudaStreamSynchronize(stream);

            float h[256];
            cudaMemcpy(h, d_probe_results, 256 * sizeof(float), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);

            int best = 0;
            float min_e = h[0];
            for(int i=1; i<256; i++) {
                if(h[i] < min_e) { min_e = h[i]; best = i; }
            }

            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["best_token"] = best;
            res["best_energy"] = min_e;

            std::vector<crow::json::wvalue> energies;
            for(int i=0; i<256; i++) energies.push_back(h[i]);
            res["energies"] = std::move(energies);

            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // Binary version for C clients - returns raw 256 floats
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/probe_vocab_binary").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Get)([&](){
            ob1_probe_vocab<<<256, 256, 0, stream>>>(state.d_state, state.d_feedback, d_probe_results);
            cudaStreamSynchronize(stream);

            float h[256];
            cudaMemcpy(h, d_probe_results, 256 * sizeof(float), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);

            std::string body(reinterpret_cast<char*>(h), 256 * sizeof(float));
            auto resp = crow::response(200, body);
            resp.set_header("Content-Type", "application/octet-stream");
            return resp;
        });

        // XYZT Crystal endpoint - Hebbian learning on IRON projections
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/crystal").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)([&](const crow::request& req){
            auto body = req.body;
            if (body.empty()) {
                return crow::response(400, "Need data");
            }

            int chunk_size = 256;
            int stride = 64;
            int learn_rounds = 20;

            auto cs = req.url_params.get("chunk");
            auto st = req.url_params.get("stride");
            auto lr = req.url_params.get("learn");
            if (cs) chunk_size = std::max(32, std::min(4096, std::atoi(cs)));
            if (st) stride = std::max(1, std::min(chunk_size, std::atoi(st)));
            if (lr) learn_rounds = std::max(1, std::min(100, std::atoi(lr)));

            const uint8_t *data = (const uint8_t*)body.data();
            int data_len = (int)body.size();

            bridge_reset(&g_bridge);

            int n_chunks = 0;
            for (int offset = 0; offset + chunk_size <= data_len; offset += stride) {
                float chunk_floats[9];
                // Simple projection: byte stats with prime modulation
                for (int p = 0; p < 9; p++) {
                    int64_t sum = 0;
                    int win = (p / 3 == 0) ? 2 : (p / 3 == 1) ? 8 : 64;
                    int prime = (p % 3 == 0) ? 137 : (p % 3 == 1) ? 251 : 397;
                    int end = std::min(offset + chunk_size, data_len);
                    for (int i = offset; i < end && i < offset + win; i++) {
                        sum += (data[i] ^ ((i * prime) & 0xFF));
                    }
                    chunk_floats[p] = (float)sum;
                }
                bridge_feed_chunk(&g_bridge, chunk_floats);
                n_chunks++;
            }

            if (n_chunks < 16) {
                return crow::response(400, "Need at least 16 chunks");
            }

            int n_edges = bridge_collide(&g_bridge);
            int changed = bridge_learn(&g_bridge, learn_rounds);
            CrystalResult crystal = bridge_read_crystal(&g_bridge);

            crow::json::wvalue result;
            result["n_chunks"] = n_chunks;
            result["n_edges"] = crystal.n_edges;
            result["learn_rounds"] = learn_rounds;
            result["edges_changed"] = changed;
            result["avg_weight"] = crystal.avg_weight;
            result["n_strong"] = crystal.n_strong;
            result["n_weak"] = crystal.n_weak;

            std::vector<crow::json::wvalue> weights;
            for (int i = 0; i < crystal.n_edges; i++) {
                weights.push_back((int)crystal.edges[i].weight);
            }
            result["weights"] = std::move(weights);

            if (crystal.n_edges > 0) {
                result["strongest"] = std::string(crystal.edges[crystal.strongest_edge].label);
                result["weakest"] = std::string(crystal.edges[crystal.weakest_edge].label);
            }

            return crow::response(200, result);
        });

        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/status").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Get)([&](){
            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["mode"] = use_fbc_mode ? "FBC" : "STANDARD";
            res["buffer_fill"] = (int)state.buffer_fill[0];
            res["buffer_capacity"] = (int)state.buffer_size;
            res["num_nodes"] = (int)state.num_nodes;
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/e6_status").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Get)([&](){
            uint32_t h_e6[6];
            cudaMemcpy(h_e6, d_e6_state, 6 * sizeof(uint32_t), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);

            crow::json::wvalue res;
            std::vector<crow::json::wvalue> vals;
            for(int i=0; i<6; i++) vals.push_back((int)h_e6[i]);
            res["e6_state"] = std::move(vals);
            res["primes"] = std::vector<int>{5, 7, 11, 13, 17, 19};
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/sync_e6").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)([&](){
            ob1_project_e8_to_e6<<<1, 6, 0, stream>>>(state.d_state, d_e6_state);
            cudaStreamSynchronize(stream);

            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["status"] = "synced";
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/crystallize").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)([&](){
            // Reset XOR state
            cudaMemset(state.h_state->xor_accumulators, 0, state.num_nodes * sizeof(uint32_t));
            cudaMemset(state.h_state->node_potentials, 0, state.num_nodes * sizeof(float));
            cudaMemset(state.h_state->node_locked, 0, state.num_nodes * sizeof(uint8_t));
            cudaMemset(state.h_state->previous_lattice_idx, 0xFF, state.num_nodes * sizeof(uint8_t));
            cudaMemset(state.h_state->connection_counts, 0, state.num_nodes * sizeof(uint32_t));

            // Reset N-Gram state (NEW)
            cudaMemset(h_ngram_state.last_ngram, 0, 4096 * sizeof(uint32_t));
            cudaMemset(h_ngram_state.repetition_count, 0, 4096 * sizeof(uint32_t));
            cudaMemset(h_ngram_state.node_locked, 0, 4096 * sizeof(uint8_t));
            cudaMemset(h_ngram_state.d_total_repetitions, 0, sizeof(uint32_t));
            cudaMemset(h_ngram_state.d_locked_count, 0, sizeof(uint32_t));

            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["status"] = "crystallized";
            res["mode"] = use_ngram_mode ? "ngram" : "xor";
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // ONETWO Processing - Applied XYZT Insights
        // Runs: VALUE-AT-POSITION, flow maps, per-position transitions, edge impedance
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/onetwo").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)([&](const crow::request& req){
            auto body = req.body;
            if (body.empty()) {
                return crow::response(400, "Need data (raw bytes to process)");
            }

            const uint8_t* data = reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(body.data());
            size_t count = body.size();

            // Run ONETWO processing
            OneTwo_Stats stats = onetwo_process(state.h_state, data, (uint32_t)count, &onetwo_bufs);

            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["vap_hits"] = (int)stats.vap_hits;
            res["vap_total"] = (int)stats.vap_total;
            res["vap_rate"] = stats.vap_rate;
            res["flow_hits"] = (int)stats.flow_hits;
            res["flow_total"] = (int)stats.flow_total;
            res["flow_rate"] = stats.flow_rate;
            res["err_count"] = (int)stats.err_count;
            res["correct_count"] = (int)stats.correct_count;
            res["self_obs_rate"] = stats.self_obs_rate;
            res["agree_count"] = (int)stats.agree_count;
            res["disagree_count"] = (int)stats.disagree_count;
            res["agree_rate"] = stats.agree_rate;
            res["inline_mode"] = (int)stats.inline_mode;
            res["bytes_processed"] = (int)count;
            res["insight"] = stats.inline_mode
                ? "XYZT inline learning: medium reshapes as signals flow (impedance matching)"
                : "Separate-phase mode: self-observation before teaching";
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // ONETWO Auto-wire - Creates connections based on spatial proximity
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/onetwo/autowire").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)([&](const crow::request& req){
            // Parse parameters from JSON body or use defaults
            uint32_t max_distance = 2;  // Default: wire nodes within distance 2
            uint32_t z_level = 0;       // Default: wire Z=0 layer

            if (!req.body.empty()) {
                auto j = crow::json::load(req.body);
                if (j) {
                    if (j.has("max_distance")) max_distance = (uint32_t)j["max_distance"].i();
                    if (j.has("z_level")) z_level = (uint32_t)j["z_level"].i();
                }
            }

            uint32_t overflow = 0;
            uint32_t wires = onetwo_autowire(state.h_state, max_distance, z_level, &overflow);

            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["wires_created"] = (unsigned long long)wires;  // Use unsigned to avoid negative display
            res["wire_overflow"] = (unsigned long long)overflow;  // Saturation metric
            res["max_distance"] = (int)max_distance;
            res["z_level"] = (int)z_level;
            res["insight"] = "Topology is data. Edges are the program. (xyzt4.c)";
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // Debug: Check ONETWO state
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/onetwo/debug").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Get)([&](){
            // Read back ONETWO state to check if it's being updated
            std::vector<uint8_t> h_pred(100);
            std::vector<uint8_t> h_conf(100);
            cudaMemcpy(h_pred.data(), state.h_state->predicted_value, 100 * sizeof(uint8_t), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);
            cudaMemcpy(h_conf.data(), state.h_state->value_confidence, 100 * sizeof(uint8_t), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);

            int non_zero_pred = 0, non_zero_conf = 0;
            for (int i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
                if (h_pred[i] != 0) non_zero_pred++;
                if (h_conf[i] != 0) non_zero_conf++;
            }

            // Check flow predictions
            std::vector<uint32_t> h_next_pred(100);
            std::vector<uint32_t> h_next_total(100);
            cudaMemcpy(h_next_pred.data(), state.h_state->next_node_pred, 100 * sizeof(uint32_t), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);
            cudaMemcpy(h_next_total.data(), state.h_state->next_node_total, 100 * sizeof(uint32_t), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);

            int non_zero_flow = 0;
            uint32_t total_flow_attempts = 0;
            for (int i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
                if (h_next_total[i] != 0) non_zero_flow++;
                total_flow_attempts += h_next_total[i];
            }

            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["sample_size"] = 100;
            res["non_zero_predictions"] = non_zero_pred;
            res["non_zero_confidence"] = non_zero_conf;
            res["non_zero_flow"] = non_zero_flow;
            res["total_flow_attempts"] = (unsigned long long)total_flow_attempts;

            // Show first few predictions
            std::vector<crow::json::wvalue> preds;
            for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
                crow::json::wvalue p;
                p["node"] = i;
                p["pred"] = (int)h_pred[i];
                p["conf"] = (int)h_conf[i];
                preds.push_back(std::move(p));
            }
            res["first_10_predictions"] = std::move(preds);

            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // Saturation stats for benchmarking
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/onetwo/saturation").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Get)([&](){
            uint32_t num_nodes = state.h_state->num_nodes;

            // Read node hit counts
            std::vector<uint32_t> h_node_hits(num_nodes);
            cudaMemcpy(h_node_hits.data(), state.h_state->d_node_hit_count,
                       num_nodes * sizeof(uint32_t), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);

            // Read connection counts
            std::vector<uint32_t> h_conn_counts(num_nodes);
            cudaMemcpy(h_conn_counts.data(), state.h_state->connection_counts,
                       num_nodes * sizeof(uint32_t), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);

            // Compute statistics
            uint32_t max_hits = 0, min_hits = UINT32_MAX;
            uint64_t total_hits = 0;
            uint32_t hot_nodes = 0;  // Nodes with > 1000 hits
            uint32_t saturated_nodes = 0;  // Nodes at max connections

            for (uint32_t i = 0; i < num_nodes; i++) {
                total_hits += h_node_hits[i];
                if (h_node_hits[i] > max_hits) max_hits = h_node_hits[i];
                if (h_node_hits[i] < min_hits && h_node_hits[i] > 0) min_hits = h_node_hits[i];
                if (h_node_hits[i] > 1000) hot_nodes++;
                if (h_conn_counts[i] >= state.h_state->max_connections) saturated_nodes++;
            }
            if (min_hits == UINT32_MAX) min_hits = 0;

            // Total connections
            uint64_t total_connections = 0;
            for (uint32_t i = 0; i < num_nodes; i++) {
                total_connections += h_conn_counts[i];
            }

            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["num_nodes"] = (int)num_nodes;
            res["max_connections"] = (int)state.h_state->max_connections;
            res["total_node_hits"] = (unsigned long long)total_hits;
            res["max_node_hits"] = (unsigned long long)max_hits;
            res["min_node_hits"] = (unsigned long long)min_hits;
            res["avg_node_hits"] = total_hits > 0 ? (double)total_hits / num_nodes : 0.0;
            res["hot_nodes"] = (int)hot_nodes;
            res["saturated_nodes"] = (int)saturated_nodes;
            res["total_connections"] = (unsigned long long)total_connections;
            res["connectivity_density"] = (double)total_connections / (num_nodes * state.h_state->max_connections);

            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // Reset saturation counters
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/onetwo/reset_stats").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)([&](){
            cudaMemset(state.h_state->d_node_hit_count, 0,
                       state.h_state->num_nodes * sizeof(uint32_t));
            cudaMemset(state.h_state->d_wire_overflow, 0, sizeof(uint32_t));
            cudaMemset(state.h_state->d_flow_atomics, 0, sizeof(uint32_t));

            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["status"] = "reset";
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // Toggle inline learning mode (XYZT-style vs separate-phase)
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/onetwo/inline_learning").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)([&](const crow::request& req){
            crow::json::wvalue res;

            if (!req.body.empty()) {
                auto j = crow::json::load(req.body);
                if (j) {
                    if (j.has("enabled")) {
                        state.h_state->inline_learning_enabled = j["enabled"].b() ? 1 : 0;
                    }
                    if (j.has("learn_rate")) {
                        state.h_state->learn_rate = (uint8_t)j["learn_rate"].i();
                    }
                    if (j.has("atrophy_rate")) {
                        state.h_state->atrophy_rate = (uint8_t)j["atrophy_rate"].i();
                    }
                    if (j.has("period")) {
                        state.h_state->inline_learning_period = (uint8_t)j["period"].i();
                    }
                }
            }

            res["inline_learning_enabled"] = (int)state.h_state->inline_learning_enabled;
            res["learn_rate"] = (int)state.h_state->learn_rate;
            res["atrophy_rate"] = (int)state.h_state->atrophy_rate;
            res["period"] = (int)state.h_state->inline_learning_period;
            res["insight"] = state.h_state->inline_learning_enabled
                ? "XYZT mode: medium reshapes as signals flow (no training/inference split)"
                : "Legacy mode: separate observation and teaching phases";
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // Get inline learning settings
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/onetwo/inline_learning").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Get)([&](){
            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["inline_learning_enabled"] = (int)state.h_state->inline_learning_enabled;
            res["learn_rate"] = (int)state.h_state->learn_rate;
            res["atrophy_rate"] = (int)state.h_state->atrophy_rate;
            res["period"] = (int)state.h_state->inline_learning_period;
            res["insight"] = state.h_state->inline_learning_enabled
                ? "XYZT mode: medium reshapes as signals flow (no training/inference split)"
                : "Legacy mode: separate observation and teaching phases";
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // =================================================================
        // XYZT PHYSICS ENGINE ENDPOINTS
        // =================================================================

        // POST /api/xyzt - Feed tokens through XYZT wave propagation
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/xyzt").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)([&](const crow::request& req){
            auto body = req.body;
            const uint8_t* data = body.empty() ? nullptr : reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(body.data());
            uint32_t count = (uint32_t)body.size();

            // Parse optional ticks from query param
            uint32_t ticks = 0;  // 0 = use default from state
            auto ticks_param = req.url_params.get("ticks");
            if (ticks_param) ticks = (uint32_t)std::atoi(ticks_param);

            XYZT_Stats stats = xyzt_process(state.h_state, data, count, ticks, &onetwo_bufs);

            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["active_cells"] = (int)stats.active_cells;
            res["gain_events"] = (int)stats.gain_events;
            res["gate_fires"] = (int)stats.gate_fires;
            res["bytes_injected"] = (int)stats.bytes_injected;
            res["ticks"] = (int)(ticks > 0 ? ticks : state.h_state->xyzt_ticks_per_call);
            res["mode"] = "fresnel";
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // POST /api/xyzt/config - Configure XYZT parameters
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/xyzt/config").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)([&](const crow::request& req){
            if (req.body.empty()) {
                return crow::response(400, "Need JSON body with config params");
            }

            auto j = crow::json::load(req.body);
            if (!j) {
                return crow::response(400, "Invalid JSON");
            }

            if (j.has("ticks_per_call"))
                state.h_state->xyzt_ticks_per_call = (uint8_t)j["ticks_per_call"].i();
            if (j.has("noise_floor"))
                state.h_state->xyzt_noise_floor = (float)j["noise_floor"].d();
            if (j.has("hebbian_rate"))
                state.h_state->xyzt_hebbian_rate = (float)j["hebbian_rate"].d();

            // Sync changed fields to device
            cudaMemcpy(state.d_state, state.h_state, sizeof(IronState), cudaMemcpyHostToDevice);

            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["ticks_per_call"] = (int)state.h_state->xyzt_ticks_per_call;
            res["noise_floor"] = (double)state.h_state->xyzt_noise_floor;
            res["hebbian_rate"] = (double)state.h_state->xyzt_hebbian_rate;
            res["mode"] = "fresnel";
            res["status"] = "config updated";
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // GET /api/xyzt/config - Read current XYZT parameters
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/xyzt/config").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Get)([&](){
            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["ticks_per_call"] = (int)state.h_state->xyzt_ticks_per_call;
            res["noise_floor"] = (double)state.h_state->xyzt_noise_floor;
            res["hebbian_rate"] = (double)state.h_state->xyzt_hebbian_rate;
            res["grid"] = "16x16x16 = 4096 nodes";
            res["mode"] = "fresnel (6-directional waves, Fresnel t/r, star junction scatter)";
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // POST /api/xyzt/wall - Set rectangular impedance barrier
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/xyzt/wall").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)([&](const crow::request& req){
            if (req.body.empty()) return crow::response(400, "Need JSON: {x,y,z,w,h,d} or {x,y,z,w,h,d,value}");
            auto j = crow::json::load(req.body);
            if (!j) return crow::response(400, "Invalid JSON");

            int wx = j.has("x") ? (int)j["x"].i() : 0;
            int wy = j.has("y") ? (int)j["y"].i() : 0;
            int wz = j.has("z") ? (int)j["z"].i() : 0;
            int ww = j.has("w") ? (int)j["w"].i() : 1;
            int wh = j.has("h") ? (int)j["h"].i() : 1;
            int wd = j.has("d") ? (int)j["d"].i() : 1;
            float val = j.has("value") ? (float)j["value"].d() : 1e6f; // default = wall (near-total reflection)

            // Set impedance for rectangular region on host, copy to device
            std::vector<float> h_Z(state.num_nodes);
            cudaMemcpy(h_Z.data(), state.h_state->xyzt_Z, state.num_nodes * sizeof(float), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);

            uint32_t cells_set = 0;
            for (int iz = wz; iz < wz + wd && iz < XYZT_NZ; iz++) {
                for (int iy = wy; iy < wy + wh && iy < XYZT_NY; iy++) {
                    for (int ix = wx; ix < wx + ww && ix < XYZT_NX; ix++) {
                        if (ix >= 0 && iy >= 0 && iz >= 0) {
                            uint32_t idx = (iz << 8) | (iy << 4) | ix;
                            h_Z[idx] = val;
                            cells_set++;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            cudaMemcpy(state.h_state->xyzt_Z, h_Z.data(), state.num_nodes * sizeof(float), cudaMemcpyHostToDevice);

            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["cells_set"] = (int)cells_set;
            res["impedance_value"] = (double)val;
            res["is_wall"] = (val >= 1e6f) ? true : false;
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // POST /api/xyzt/open - Lower impedance in region (OP_OPEN)
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/xyzt/open").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)([&](const crow::request& req){
            if (req.body.empty()) return crow::response(400, "Need JSON: {x,y,z,w,h,d}");
            auto j = crow::json::load(req.body);
            if (!j) return crow::response(400, "Invalid JSON");

            int wx = j.has("x") ? (int)j["x"].i() : 0;
            int wy = j.has("y") ? (int)j["y"].i() : 0;
            int wz = j.has("z") ? (int)j["z"].i() : 0;
            int ww = j.has("w") ? (int)j["w"].i() : 1;
            int wh = j.has("h") ? (int)j["h"].i() : 1;
            int wd = j.has("d") ? (int)j["d"].i() : 1;

            std::vector<float> h_Z(state.num_nodes);
            cudaMemcpy(h_Z.data(), state.h_state->xyzt_Z, state.num_nodes * sizeof(float), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);

            uint32_t cells_set = 0;
            for (int iz = wz; iz < wz + wd && iz < XYZT_NZ; iz++) {
                for (int iy = wy; iy < wy + wh && iy < XYZT_NY; iy++) {
                    for (int ix = wx; ix < wx + ww && ix < XYZT_NX; ix++) {
                        if (ix >= 0 && iy >= 0 && iz >= 0) {
                            uint32_t idx = (iz << 8) | (iy << 4) | ix;
                            h_Z[idx] = 1.0f + iz * 0.5f;  // reset to depth-based default
                            cells_set++;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            cudaMemcpy(state.h_state->xyzt_Z, h_Z.data(), state.num_nodes * sizeof(float), cudaMemcpyHostToDevice);

            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["cells_opened"] = (int)cells_set;
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // POST /api/xyzt/reset - Zero all XYZT signal buffers and reset impedance
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/xyzt/reset").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)([&](const crow::request& req){
            uint32_t n = state.num_nodes;
            // Zero wave buffers
            cudaMemset(state.h_state->xyzt_waves, 0, n * NUM_DIRS * sizeof(float));
            cudaMemset(state.h_state->xyzt_waves_in, 0, n * NUM_DIRS * sizeof(float));
            cudaMemset(state.h_state->xyzt_energy, 0, n * sizeof(float));
            // Reset impedance Z by depth: Z = 1.0 + z * 0.5
            std::vector<float> h_Z(n);
            for (uint32_t i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                int z = (i >> 8) & 0xF;
                h_Z[i] = 1.0f + z * 0.5f;
            }
            cudaMemcpy(state.h_state->xyzt_Z, h_Z.data(), n * sizeof(float), cudaMemcpyHostToDevice);
            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["reset"] = true;
            res["nodes_zeroed"] = (int)n;
            res["mode"] = "fresnel";
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // POST /api/xyzt/spawn - Create wires from signal correlation
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/xyzt/spawn").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)([&](const crow::request& req){
            float threshold = 0.1f;  // default: minimum wave correlation
            if (!req.body.empty()) {
                auto j = crow::json::load(req.body);
                if (j && j.has("threshold")) threshold = (float)j["threshold"].d();
            }

            SpawnPruneStats sp = xyzt_spawn(state.h_state, threshold);

            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["wires_spawned"] = (int)sp.spawned;
            res["correlation_threshold"] = (double)threshold;
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // POST /api/xyzt/prune - Remove weak wires
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/xyzt/prune").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)([&](const crow::request& req){
            uint16_t threshold = 8192;  // default: 0.25 of max weight
            if (!req.body.empty()) {
                auto j = crow::json::load(req.body);
                if (j && j.has("threshold")) threshold = (uint16_t)j["threshold"].i();
            }

            SpawnPruneStats sp = xyzt_prune(state.h_state, threshold);

            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["wires_pruned"] = (int)sp.pruned;
            res["weight_threshold"] = (int)threshold;
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // GET /api/xyzt/probe - Non-destructive signal read
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/xyzt/probe").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Get)([&](const crow::request& req){
            // Read energy field from device
            std::vector<float> h_energy(state.num_nodes);
            cudaMemcpy(h_energy.data(), state.h_state->xyzt_energy, state.num_nodes * sizeof(float), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);

            // Optional: filter by z-slab
            int z_filter = -1;  // -1 = all
            auto z_param = req.url_params.get("z");
            if (z_param) z_filter = std::atoi(z_param);

            float min_e = 1e9f, max_e = 0.0f;
            uint32_t active = 0;
            double sum = 0.0;

            std::vector<crow::json::wvalue> energy_data;
            for (uint32_t i = 0; i < state.num_nodes; i++) {
                int z = (i >> 8) & 0xF;
                if (z_filter >= 0 && z != z_filter) continue;

                float e = h_energy[i];
                if (e > 0.0f) active++;
                if (e < min_e) min_e = e;
                if (e > max_e) max_e = e;
                sum += e;
                energy_data.push_back(e);
            }

            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["energy"] = std::move(energy_data);
            res["active_cells"] = (int)active;
            res["min_energy"] = (double)min_e;
            res["max_energy"] = (double)max_e;
            res["mean_energy"] = energy_data.size() > 0 ? sum / energy_data.size() : 0.0;
            res["total_energy"] = sum;
            res["z_filter"] = z_filter;
            res["mode"] = "fresnel";
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/lattice_stats").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Get)([&](){
            crow::json::wvalue res;

            if (use_ngram_mode) {
                // N-GRAM MODE STATS
                uint32_t h_total_reps = 0, h_locked_count = 0;
                cudaMemcpy(&h_total_reps, h_ngram_state.d_total_repetitions, sizeof(uint32_t), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);
                cudaMemcpy(&h_locked_count, h_ngram_state.d_locked_count, sizeof(uint32_t), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);

                // Also count from node_locked array for consistency
                std::vector<uint8_t> h_locked(4096);
                std::vector<uint32_t> h_reps(4096);
                cudaMemcpy(h_locked.data(), h_ngram_state.node_locked, 4096 * sizeof(uint8_t), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);
                cudaMemcpy(h_reps.data(), h_ngram_state.repetition_count, 4096 * sizeof(uint32_t), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);

                uint32_t locked_nodes = 0;
                uint32_t total_reps = 0;
                for (int i = 0; i < 4096; i++) {
                    if (h_locked[i]) locked_nodes++;
                    total_reps += h_reps[i];
                }

                res["mode"] = "ngram";
                res["locked_nodes"] = (int)locked_nodes;
                res["locked_count"] = (int)locked_nodes;  // Alias for compatibility
                res["total_repetitions"] = (int)total_reps;
                res["total_connections"] = (int)total_reps;  // Alias for compatibility
                res["total_nodes"] = 4096;
                res["window_size"] = ngram_window_size;
                res["lock_threshold"] = ngram_lock_threshold;
            } else {
                // Original XOR MODE STATS
                std::vector<uint8_t> h_locked(state.num_nodes);
                std::vector<uint32_t> h_conn(state.num_nodes);
                cudaMemcpy(h_locked.data(), state.h_state->node_locked,
                           state.num_nodes * sizeof(uint8_t), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);
                cudaMemcpy(h_conn.data(), state.h_state->connection_counts,
                           state.num_nodes * sizeof(uint32_t), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);

                uint32_t locked_count = 0;
                uint32_t total_connections = 0;
                for (uint32_t i = 0; i < state.num_nodes; i++) {
                    if (h_locked[i]) locked_count++;
                    total_connections += h_conn[i];
                }

                res["mode"] = "xor";
                res["locked_count"] = (int)locked_count;
                res["total_nodes"] = (int)state.num_nodes;
                res["lock_ratio"] = (double)locked_count / state.num_nodes;
                res["total_connections"] = (int)total_connections;
            }
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // State snapshot for surprise-based prediction
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/state_snapshot").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Get)([&](){
            // Return first 256 XOR accumulators as raw bytes
            std::vector<uint32_t> h_xor(256);
            cudaMemcpy(h_xor.data(), state.h_state->xor_accumulators,
                       256 * sizeof(uint32_t), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);

            std::string body(reinterpret_cast<char*>(h_xor.data()), 256 * sizeof(uint32_t));
            auto resp = crow::response(200, body);
            resp.set_header("Content-Type", "application/octet-stream");
            return resp;
        });

        // =================================================================
        // IRON MULTI-PROJECTION FINGERPRINT
        // The ONETWO breakthrough: 6 floats at 326 GB/s that discriminate
        // =================================================================
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/fingerprint").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)([&](const crow::request& req){
            std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(state_mutex);

            // Get raw bytes from request body
            const uint8_t* data = (const uint8_t*)req.body.data();
            size_t byte_count = req.body.size();

            if (byte_count == 0) {
                crow::json::wvalue res;
                res["error"] = "No data provided";
                return crow::response(400, res);
            }

            // Copy to device
            uint8_t* d_data;
            cudaMalloc(&d_data, byte_count);
            cudaMemcpy(d_data, data, byte_count, cudaMemcpyHostToDevice);

            // Run multi-projection
            cudaEvent_t start, stop;
            cudaEventCreate(&start);
            cudaEventCreate(&stop);

            cudaEventRecord(start, stream);
            launch_iron_fingerprint(d_data, byte_count, d_fingerprint, stream);
            cudaEventRecord(stop, stream);
            cudaEventSynchronize(stop);

            float ms;
            cudaEventElapsedTime(&ms, start, stop);

            // Get results
            IronFingerprint h_fp;
            cudaMemcpy(&h_fp, d_fingerprint, sizeof(IronFingerprint), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);

            cudaFree(d_data);
            cudaEventDestroy(start);
            cudaEventDestroy(stop);

            // Build response
            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["bytes"] = (int)byte_count;
            res["time_ms"] = ms;
            res["throughput_gbps"] = (byte_count / 1e9) / (ms / 1000.0);

            // Potentials (the discriminating values)
            res["pot_137"] = h_fp.pot[0];
            res["pot_251"] = h_fp.pot[1];
            res["pot_397"] = h_fp.pot[2];

            // XOR values (for debugging)
            char hex[12];
            snprintf(hex, sizeof(hex), "0x%08X", h_fp.xor_[0]); res["xor_137"] = hex;
            snprintf(hex, sizeof(hex), "0x%08X", h_fp.xor_[1]); res["xor_251"] = hex;
            snprintf(hex, sizeof(hex), "0x%08X", h_fp.xor_[2]); res["xor_397"] = hex;

            // Fingerprint as array for easy comparison
            crow::json::wvalue fp;
            fp[0] = h_fp.pot[0];
            fp[1] = h_fp.pot[1];
            fp[2] = h_fp.pot[2];
            res["fingerprint"] = std::move(fp);

            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // =================================================================
        // IRON MULTI-SCALE FINGERPRINT (Layer 1)
        // 3 windows × 3 primes = 9 projections = 18 floats
        // Window 2: character-level, Window 8: word-level, Window 64: line-level
        // =================================================================
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/multiscale").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)([&](const crow::request& req){
            std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(state_mutex);

            const uint8_t* data = (const uint8_t*)req.body.data();
            size_t byte_count = req.body.size();

            if (byte_count == 0) {
                crow::json::wvalue res;
                res["error"] = "No data provided";
                return crow::response(400, res);
            }

            // Copy to device
            uint8_t* d_data;
            cudaMalloc(&d_data, byte_count);
            cudaMemcpy(d_data, data, byte_count, cudaMemcpyHostToDevice);

            // Run multi-scale projection (9 kernels)
            cudaEvent_t start, stop;
            cudaEventCreate(&start);
            cudaEventCreate(&stop);

            cudaEventRecord(start, stream);
            launch_iron_multiscale(d_data, byte_count, d_multiscale, stream);
            cudaEventRecord(stop, stream);
            cudaEventSynchronize(stop);

            float ms;
            cudaEventElapsedTime(&ms, start, stop);

            // Get results
            IronMultiScale h_ms;
            cudaMemcpy(&h_ms, d_multiscale, sizeof(IronMultiScale), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);

            cudaFree(d_data);
            cudaEventDestroy(start);
            cudaEventDestroy(stop);

            // Build response
            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["bytes"] = (int)byte_count;
            res["time_ms"] = ms;
            res["throughput_gbps"] = (byte_count / 1e9) / (ms / 1000.0);

            // Character-level (window=2)
            crow::json::wvalue char_level;
            char_level["pot_137"] = h_ms.pot[0];
            char_level["pot_251"] = h_ms.pot[1];
            char_level["pot_397"] = h_ms.pot[2];
            res["char_w2"] = std::move(char_level);

            // Word-level (window=8)
            crow::json::wvalue word_level;
            word_level["pot_137"] = h_ms.pot[3];
            word_level["pot_251"] = h_ms.pot[4];
            word_level["pot_397"] = h_ms.pot[5];
            res["word_w8"] = std::move(word_level);

            // Line-level (window=64)
            crow::json::wvalue line_level;
            line_level["pot_137"] = h_ms.pot[6];
            line_level["pot_251"] = h_ms.pot[7];
            line_level["pot_397"] = h_ms.pot[8];
            res["line_w64"] = std::move(line_level);

            // Full 9-float fingerprint as array
            crow::json::wvalue fp;
            for (int i = 0; i < 9; i++) {
                fp[i] = h_ms.pot[i];
            }
            res["fingerprint"] = std::move(fp);

            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // =================================================================
        // IRON TEMPORAL FINGERPRINT (Layer 2)
        // Sliding window trajectory through fingerprint-space
        // The structure OF structure - where transitions happen
        // =================================================================
        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/temporal").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)([&](const crow::request& req){
            std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(state_mutex);

            const uint8_t* data = (const uint8_t*)req.body.data();
            size_t byte_count = req.body.size();

            // Parse query params for chunk_size and stride
            size_t chunk_size = 256;  // Default: 256 bytes per chunk
            size_t stride = 64;       // Default: 64 byte stride (4x overlap)

            auto chunk_param = req.url_params.get("chunk");
            auto stride_param = req.url_params.get("stride");
            if (chunk_param) chunk_size = std::stoull(chunk_param);
            if (stride_param) stride = std::stoull(stride_param);

            if (byte_count < chunk_size) {
                crow::json::wvalue res;
                res["error"] = "Data smaller than chunk size";
                return crow::response(400, res);
            }

            size_t num_chunks = (byte_count - chunk_size) / stride + 1;

            // Limit to prevent OOM
            if (num_chunks > 100000) {
                crow::json::wvalue res;
                res["error"] = "Too many chunks (max 100000). Increase stride or chunk_size.";
                return crow::response(400, res);
            }

            // Copy data to device
            uint8_t* d_data;
            cudaMalloc(&d_data, byte_count);
            cudaMemcpy(d_data, data, byte_count, cudaMemcpyHostToDevice);

            // Allocate trajectory arrays
            float* d_pot_array;
            uint32_t* d_xor_array;
            cudaMalloc(&d_pot_array, num_chunks * 9 * sizeof(float));
            cudaMalloc(&d_xor_array, num_chunks * 9 * sizeof(uint32_t));
            cudaMemset(d_pot_array, 0, num_chunks * 9 * sizeof(float));
            cudaMemset(d_xor_array, 0, num_chunks * 9 * sizeof(uint32_t));

            // Run temporal fingerprinting
            cudaEvent_t start, stop;
            cudaEventCreate(&start);
            cudaEventCreate(&stop);

            cudaEventRecord(start, stream);
            size_t actual_chunks = launch_iron_temporal(
                d_data, byte_count, chunk_size, stride,
                d_pot_array, d_xor_array, stream
            );
            cudaEventRecord(stop, stream);
            cudaEventSynchronize(stop);

            float ms;
            cudaEventElapsedTime(&ms, start, stop);

            // Copy results back
            std::vector<float> h_pot(actual_chunks * 9);
            cudaMemcpy(h_pot.data(), d_pot_array, actual_chunks * 9 * sizeof(float), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);

            cudaFree(d_data);
            cudaFree(d_pot_array);
            cudaFree(d_xor_array);
            cudaEventDestroy(start);
            cudaEventDestroy(stop);

            // Build response
            crow::json::wvalue res;
            res["bytes"] = (int)byte_count;
            res["chunk_size"] = (int)chunk_size;
            res["stride"] = (int)stride;
            res["num_chunks"] = (int)actual_chunks;
            res["time_ms"] = ms;

            // Trajectory: array of 9-float fingerprints
            crow::json::wvalue trajectory;
            for (size_t c = 0; c < actual_chunks; c++) {
                crow::json::wvalue chunk_fp;
                for (int i = 0; i < 9; i++) {
                    chunk_fp[i] = h_pot[c * 9 + i];
                }
                trajectory[c] = std::move(chunk_fp);
            }
            res["trajectory"] = std::move(trajectory);

            // Compute transition magnitudes (L1 distance between consecutive chunks)
            if (actual_chunks > 1) {
                crow::json::wvalue transitions;
                for (size_t c = 1; c < actual_chunks; c++) {
                    float dist = 0;
                    for (int i = 0; i < 9; i++) {
                        dist += fabsf(h_pot[c * 9 + i] - h_pot[(c-1) * 9 + i]);
                    }
                    transitions[c-1] = dist;
                }
                res["transitions"] = std::move(transitions);
            }

            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/state").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Get)([&](){
            // Return XOR accumulators of locked nodes for closure test
            std::vector<uint32_t> h_xor(state.num_nodes);
            std::vector<uint8_t> h_locked(state.num_nodes);
            cudaMemcpy(h_xor.data(), state.h_state->xor_accumulators,
                       state.num_nodes * sizeof(uint32_t), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);
            cudaMemcpy(h_locked.data(), state.h_state->node_locked,
                       state.num_nodes * sizeof(uint8_t), cudaMemcpyDeviceToHost);

            crow::json::wvalue res;
            std::vector<crow::json::wvalue> xor_vals;
            std::vector<crow::json::wvalue> locked_indices;

            for (uint32_t i = 0; i < state.num_nodes; i++) {
                xor_vals.push_back((int)h_xor[i]);
                if (h_locked[i]) {
                    locked_indices.push_back((int)i);
                }
            }

            res["xor_accumulators"] = std::move(xor_vals);
            res["locked_nodes"] = std::move(locked_indices);
            res["num_nodes"] = (int)state.num_nodes;
            return crow::response(200, res);
        });

        // =================================================================
        // INFERENCE ENDPOINT
        // =================================================================
        if (inference_engine) {
            CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/inference").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)
            ([&](const crow::request& req) {
                auto body = crow::json::load(req.body);
                if (!body) {
                    return crow::response(400, "Invalid JSON");
                }

                // Accept token_ids array or prompt string
                std::vector<int> token_ids;

                if (body.has("token_ids")) {
                    for (auto& t : body["token_ids"]) {
                        token_ids.push_back((int)t.i());
                    }
                } else if (body.has("prompt")) {
                    // For now, just use raw bytes as token IDs (real tokenizer comes later)
                    std::string prompt = body["prompt"].s();
                    for (char c : prompt) {
                        token_ids.push_back((int)(unsigned char)c);
                    }
                } else {
                    return crow::response(400, "Need 'token_ids' or 'prompt'");
                }

                int max_tokens = 32;
                if (body.has("max_tokens")) {
                    max_tokens = (int)body["max_tokens"].i();
                    if (max_tokens > 256) max_tokens = 256;
                }

                bool reset = true;
                if (body.has("reset")) reset = body["reset"].b();

                if (reset) inference_engine->reset();

                // Process prompt tokens
                for (int tid : token_ids) {
                    inference_engine->forward(tid);
                }

                // Generate
                std::vector<int> generated;
                for (int i = 0; i < max_tokens; i++) {
                    int last = generated.empty() ? token_ids.back() : generated.back();
                    int next = inference_engine->forward(last);
                    generated.push_back(next);
                    // Stop on EOS (151645 for Qwen3)
                    if (next == 151645) break;
                }

                crow::json::wvalue res;
                res["generated_ids"] = generated;
                res["prompt_ids"] = token_ids;
                res["num_generated"] = (int)generated.size();

                // Also return raw bytes interpretation
                std::string text;
                for (int id : generated) {
                    if (id < 256) text += (char)id;
                    else text += "[" + std::to_string(id) + "]";
                }
                res["generated_text"] = text;

                return crow::response(200, res);
            });

            CROW_ROUTE(app, "/api/inference/reset").methods(crow::HTTPMethod::Post)
            ([&](const crow::request&) {
                inference_engine->reset();
                crow::json::wvalue res;
                res["status"] = "reset";
                return crow::response(200, res);
            });
        }

        std::cout << "[IRON] Listening on :8080" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  POST /api/feed        - Buffer tokens" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  POST /api/flush       - Trigger cascade" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  GET  /api/probe_vocab - Probe 256 tokens" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  GET  /api/status      - Server status" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  GET  /api/e6_status   - E6 gate state" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  GET  /api/lattice_stats - Locked nodes count" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  POST /api/sync_e6     - Sync E6 from E8" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  POST /api/crystallize - Reset lattice" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  POST /api/fingerprint - IRON Layer 0 (6 floats - entropy)" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  POST /api/multiscale  - IRON Layer 1 (18 floats - hierarchy)" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  POST /api/temporal    - IRON Layer 2 (trajectory - transitions)" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  POST /api/crystal     - XYZT Layer 3 (Hebbian edge weights)" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  POST /api/onetwo      - ONETWO processing (VAP, flow, transitions)" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  POST /api/onetwo/autowire - Auto-wire nodes by proximity" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  POST /api/xyzt        - XYZT wave propagation (fused physics)" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  POST /api/xyzt/config - Configure XYZT parameters" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  GET  /api/xyzt/config - Read XYZT config" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  POST /api/xyzt/wall   - Set impedance barrier (wall isolation)" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  POST /api/xyzt/open   - Open impedance region" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  POST /api/xyzt/reset  - Zero signal buffers + reset impedance" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  POST /api/xyzt/spawn  - Spawn wires from signal correlation" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  POST /api/xyzt/prune  - Prune weak wires" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  GET  /api/xyzt/probe  - Non-destructive signal read" << std::endl;
        if (inference_engine) {
            std::cout << "  POST /api/inference   - Generate tokens (JSON: token_ids/prompt)" << std::endl;
            std::cout << "  POST /api/inference/reset - Reset KV cache" << std::endl;
        }
        std::cout << "========================================" << std::endl;

        app.port(8080).multithreaded().run();
    }

    return 0;
}
/*
 * xyzt_lib.c — XYZT Engine implementation (library version)
 *
 * Extracted from xyzt.c. All functions, no main(), no tests.
 * Compile as C: cl /c /O2 xyzt_lib.c   (MSVC)
 *           or: gcc -O3 -c xyzt_lib.c   (GCC)
 * Link into your CUDA project.
 */

#include "xyzt_lib.h"
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>
#include <math.h>

/* MSVC vs GCC popcount compatibility */
#ifdef _MSC_VER
#include <intrin.h>
#define POPCNT64(x) __popcnt64(x)
#else
#define POPCNT64(x) __builtin_popcountll(x)
#endif

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   T — nanosecond substrate (platform-specific)
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

#ifdef _WIN32
#include <windows.h>
static LARGE_INTEGER _t_freq, _t_birth;
static uint64_t _t_count = 0;

void T_init(void) {
    QueryPerformanceFrequency(&_t_freq);
    QueryPerformanceCounter(&_t_birth);
    _t_count = 0;
}
uint64_t T_tick(void) { return ++_t_count; }
uint64_t T_ns(void) {
    LARGE_INTEGER now;
    QueryPerformanceCounter(&now);
    return (uint64_t)((now.QuadPart - _t_birth.QuadPart) * 1000000000ULL / _t_freq.QuadPart);
}
static void T_sleep_us(int us) { Sleep(us / 1000 > 0 ? us / 1000 : 1); }
#else
#include <time.h>
static struct timespec _t_birth;
static uint64_t _t_count = 0;

void T_init(void) { clock_gettime(CLOCK_MONOTONIC, &_t_birth); _t_count = 0; }
uint64_t T_tick(void) { return ++_t_count; }
uint64_t T_ns(void) {
    struct timespec now; clock_gettime(CLOCK_MONOTONIC, &now);
    return (now.tv_sec - _t_birth.tv_sec)*1000000000ULL + (now.tv_nsec - _t_birth.tv_nsec);
}
static void T_sleep_us(int us) { struct timespec ts = {0, us*1000L}; nanosleep(&ts, NULL); }
#endif

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   BITSTREAM
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void bs_clear(BitStream *b) {
    int words = (b->len + 63) / 64;
    if (words > 0) memset(b->w, 0, words * sizeof(uint64_t));
    b->len = 0;
}

void bs_init(BitStream *b) { b->len = 0; }

void bs_push(BitStream *b, int bit) {
    int idx = b->len / 64, off = b->len % 64;
    if (off == 0) b->w[idx] = 0;
    if (bit) b->w[idx] |= (1ULL << off);
    b->len++;
}

int bs_get(const BitStream *b, int t) {
    if (t < 0 || t >= b->len) return 0;
    return (b->w[t/64] >> (t%64)) & 1;
}

int bs_popcount(const BitStream *b) {
    int ones = 0, full = b->len / 64;
    for (int i = 0; i < full; i++) ones += (int)POPCNT64(b->w[i]);
    int rem = b->len % 64;
    if (rem) ones += (int)POPCNT64(b->w[full] & ((1ULL << rem) - 1));
    return ones;
}

int bs_activity_pct(const BitStream *b) {
    return b->len ? (bs_popcount(b) * 100) / b->len : 0;
}

void bs_pattern(const BitStream *b, char *buf, int max) {
    int n = b->len < max-1 ? b->len : max-1;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) buf[i] = bs_get(b, i) ? '1' : '_';
    buf[n] = '\0';
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   RUN-LENGTH ANALYSIS
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void bs_runs(const BitStream *b, RunList *runs) {
    runs->count = 0;
    if (b->len == 0) return;
    int cur = bs_get(b, 0), run_len = 1;
    for (int i = 1; i < b->len; i++) {
        int bit = bs_get(b, i);
        if (bit == cur) { run_len++; }
        else {
            if (runs->count < MAX_RUNS) {
                runs->types[runs->count] = cur;
                runs->lengths[runs->count] = run_len;
                runs->count++;
            }
            cur = bit; run_len = 1;
        }
    }
    if (runs->count < MAX_RUNS) {
        runs->types[runs->count] = cur;
        runs->lengths[runs->count] = run_len;
        runs->count++;
    }
}

int bs_decode_values(const BitStream *b, int *values, int max_values) {
    RunList runs; bs_runs(b, &runs);
    int n = runs.count < max_values ? runs.count : max_values;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) values[i] = runs.lengths[i];
    return n;
}

Prediction bs_predict(const BitStream *b) {
    Prediction p = {0,0,0,0};
    RunList runs; bs_runs(b, &runs);
    int ones[MAX_RUNS], n_ones = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < runs.count; i++)
        if (runs.types[i] == 1) ones[n_ones++] = runs.lengths[i];
    if (n_ones < 3) return p;

    /* Constant delta? */
    int d0 = ones[1] - ones[0], constant_d = 1;
    for (int i = 2; i < n_ones; i++)
        if (ones[i] - ones[i-1] != d0) { constant_d = 0; break; }
    if (constant_d) {
        p.valid = 1; p.delta = d0; p.predicted = ones[n_ones-1] + d0;
        return p;
    }

    /* Constant acceleration? */
    if (n_ones >= 4) {
        int deltas[MAX_RUNS];
        for (int i = 0; i < n_ones-1; i++) deltas[i] = ones[i+1] - ones[i];
        int dd0 = deltas[1] - deltas[0], constant_dd = 1;
        for (int i = 2; i < n_ones-1; i++)
            if (deltas[i] - deltas[i-1] != dd0) { constant_dd = 0; break; }
        if (constant_dd) {
            p.valid = 1; p.accel = dd0; p.delta = deltas[n_ones-2];
            p.predicted = ones[n_ones-1] + p.delta + dd0;
            return p;
        }
    }
    return p;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   TRANSDUCER
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void xdcr_init(Transducer *x) { memset(x, 0, sizeof(*x)); x->threshold = 1; }

int xdcr_feed(Transducer *x, BitStream *out, int64_t val) {
    x->count++;
    if (x->count == 1) { x->prev = val; bs_push(out, 0); return 0; }
    int64_t delta = llabs(val - x->prev); x->prev = val;
    if (x->hist_len < 64) x->hist[x->hist_len++] = delta;
    else x->hist[x->count % 64] = delta;
    if (!x->calibrated && x->count >= 16) {
        int64_t s[64]; int nd = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < x->hist_len; i++) if (x->hist[i] > 0) s[nd++] = x->hist[i];
        for (int i = 1; i < nd; i++) {
            int64_t k = s[i]; int j = i-1;
            while (j >= 0 && s[j] > k) { s[j+1] = s[j]; j--; }
            s[j+1] = k;
        }
        x->threshold = nd > 0 ? s[nd/4] : 1; x->calibrated = 1;
    }
    int bit = delta >= x->threshold; bs_push(out, bit); return bit;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   COORDINATES
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

Coord coord_pack(int x, int y, int z) {
    return ((uint32_t)(x&0x3FF)<<22)|((uint32_t)(y&0x3FF)<<12)|((uint32_t)(z&0xFF)<<4);
}
int coord_x(Coord c) { return (c>>22)&0x3FF; }
int coord_y(Coord c) { return (c>>12)&0x3FF; }
int coord_z(Coord c) { return (c>>4)&0xFF; }
int coord_manhattan(Coord a, Coord b) {
    return abs(coord_x(a)-coord_x(b)) + abs(coord_y(a)-coord_y(b));
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   JUNCTIONS
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void jxn_apply(const BitStream *a, const BitStream *b, BitStream *dst, JunctionType t) {
    int n = a->len < b->len ? a->len : b->len;
    int nw = (n+63)/64;
    dst->len = n;
    switch(t) {
        case JXN_XOR:  for(int i=0;i<nw;i++) dst->w[i]=a->w[i]^b->w[i]; break;
        case JXN_AND:  for(int i=0;i<nw;i++) dst->w[i]=a->w[i]&b->w[i]; break;
        case JXN_OR:   for(int i=0;i<nw;i++) dst->w[i]=a->w[i]|b->w[i]; break;
        case JXN_NAND: for(int i=0;i<nw;i++) dst->w[i]=~(a->w[i]&b->w[i]); break;
    }
}

int jxn_newest_bit(const BitStream *a, const BitStream *b, JunctionType t) {
    int n = a->len < b->len ? a->len : b->len;
    if (n == 0) return 0;
    int idx = (n-1)/64, off = (n-1)%64;
    uint64_t result;
    switch(t) {
        case JXN_XOR:  result = a->w[idx] ^ b->w[idx]; break;
        case JXN_AND:  result = a->w[idx] & b->w[idx]; break;
        case JXN_OR:   result = a->w[idx] | b->w[idx]; break;
        case JXN_NAND: result = ~(a->w[idx] & b->w[idx]); break;
        default: result = 0;
    }
    return (result >> off) & 1;
}

int analysis_corr_pct(const BitStream *a, const BitStream *b) {
    int n = a->len < b->len ? a->len : b->len; if (!n) return 0;
    int agree = 0, full = n/64;
    for (int i = 0; i < full; i++) agree += (int)POPCNT64(~(a->w[i] ^ b->w[i]));
    int rem = n % 64;
    if (rem) agree += (int)POPCNT64((~(a->w[full] ^ b->w[full])) & ((1ULL << rem)-1));
    return (agree * 100) / n;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   GRAPH ENGINE
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

void graph_init(Graph *g) { memset(g, 0, sizeof(Graph)); }

int graph_add_sensor(Graph *g, int x, int y, const char *name,
                     int64_t (*fn)(void), int is_delta) {
    if (g->n_nodes >= MAX_NODES) return -1;
    int id = g->n_nodes++;
    Node *n = &g->nodes[id];
    n->coord = coord_pack(x, y, 0);
    strncpy(n->name, name, 23);
    bs_clear(&n->bs);
    n->xdcr = (Transducer*)malloc(sizeof(Transducer)); xdcr_init(n->xdcr);
    n->sensor_fn = fn; n->is_delta = is_delta;
    return id;
}

int graph_add_node(Graph *g, int x, int y, int z, const char *name) {
    if (g->n_nodes >= MAX_NODES) return -1;
    int id = g->n_nodes++;
    Node *n = &g->nodes[id];
    n->coord = coord_pack(x, y, z);
    strncpy(n->name, name, 23);
    bs_clear(&n->bs);
    n->xdcr = NULL; n->sensor_fn = NULL;
    return id;
}

int graph_add_pattern(Graph *g, int x, int y, int z,
                      const char *name, const char *pat) {
    int id = graph_add_node(g, x, y, z, name);
    if (id < 0) return -1;
    for (int i = 0; pat[i]; i++) bs_push(&g->nodes[id].bs, pat[i] == '1');
    return id;
}

int graph_wire(Graph *g, int a, int b, int dst, JunctionType jt,
               int weight, int delay) {
    if (g->n_edges >= MAX_EDGES || a < 0 || b < 0 || dst < 0) return -1;
    int id = g->n_edges++;
    Edge *e = &g->edges[id];
    e->src_a = a; e->src_b = b; e->dst = dst; e->jtype = jt;
    e->weight = weight > 0 ? weight : 255;
    e->delay = delay > 0 ? delay : 0;
    e->pending_bit = 0; e->consistent = 0; e->last_output = 0;
    return id;
}

int graph_add_edge(Graph *g, int a, int b, int dst, JunctionType jt) {
    return graph_wire(g, a, b, dst, jt, 255, 0);
}

int graph_autowire(Graph *g, int z_level, int max_dist) {
    int at_z[MAX_NODES], nz = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < g->n_nodes; i++)
        if (coord_z(g->nodes[i].coord) == z_level) at_z[nz++] = i;
    if (nz < 2) return 0;

    JunctionType jt = (z_level % 2 == 0) ? JXN_XOR : JXN_AND;
    int out_z = z_level + 1, created = 0;

    for (int i = 0; i < nz; i++) {
        for (int j = i+1; j < nz; j++) {
            int dist = coord_manhattan(g->nodes[at_z[i]].coord, g->nodes[at_z[j]].coord);
            if (dist > 0 && dist <= max_dist) {
                int ax = coord_x(g->nodes[at_z[i]].coord);
                int ay = coord_y(g->nodes[at_z[i]].coord);
                int bx = coord_x(g->nodes[at_z[j]].coord);
                int by = coord_y(g->nodes[at_z[j]].coord);
                char name[24];
                snprintf(name, 24, "%.6s%c%.6s", g->nodes[at_z[i]].name,
                         jt == JXN_XOR ? '^' : '&', g->nodes[at_z[j]].name);
                int out = graph_add_node(g, (ax+bx)/2, (ay+by)/2, out_z, name);
                if (out < 0) return created;
                int w = dist > 0 ? 255/dist : 255;
                graph_wire(g, at_z[i], at_z[j], out, jt, w, 0);
                created++;
            }
        }
    }
    return created;
}

void graph_tick(Graph *g) {
    T_tick();
    /* Phase 1: sensors */
    for (int i = 0; i < g->n_nodes; i++) {
        Node *n = &g->nodes[i];
        if (!n->sensor_fn || !n->xdcr) continue;
        int64_t raw = n->sensor_fn();
        if (n->is_delta) {
            int64_t val = raw - g->prev_sensor[i];
            g->prev_sensor[i] = raw;
            xdcr_feed(n->xdcr, &n->bs, val);
        } else {
            xdcr_feed(n->xdcr, &n->bs, raw);
        }
    }
    /* Phase 2: edges with weight/delay filter */
    for (int i = 0; i < g->n_edges; i++) {
        Edge *e = &g->edges[i];
        BitStream *a = &g->nodes[e->src_a].bs;
        BitStream *b = &g->nodes[e->src_b].bs;
        BitStream *d = &g->nodes[e->dst].bs;
        int input_len = a->len < b->len ? a->len : b->len;
        if (input_len <= d->len) continue;

        if (e->delay == 0) {
            jxn_apply(a, b, d, e->jtype);
        } else {
            int newest = jxn_newest_bit(a, b, e->jtype);
            if (newest == e->pending_bit) e->consistent++;
            else { e->pending_bit = newest; e->consistent = 1; }
            int effective = (e->consistent * e->weight) / 255;
            if (effective >= e->delay) {
                jxn_apply(a, b, d, e->jtype);
                e->last_output = newest;
            } else {
                bs_push(d, e->last_output);
            }
        }
    }
}

void graph_tick_z_ordered(Graph *g) {
    T_tick();
    /* Phase 1: sensors */
    for (int i = 0; i < g->n_nodes; i++) {
        Node *n = &g->nodes[i];
        if (!n->sensor_fn || !n->xdcr) continue;
        int64_t raw = n->sensor_fn();
        if (n->is_delta) {
            int64_t val = raw - g->prev_sensor[i];
            g->prev_sensor[i] = raw;
            xdcr_feed(n->xdcr, &n->bs, val);
        } else {
            xdcr_feed(n->xdcr, &n->bs, raw);
        }
    }
    /* Phase 2: Z-ordered, then Y-ordered within Z */
    int max_z = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < g->n_nodes; i++) {
        int z = coord_z(g->nodes[i].coord);
        if (z > max_z) max_z = z;
    }
    for (int z = 0; z <= max_z; z++) {
        int max_y = -1;
        for (int i = 0; i < g->n_edges; i++) {
            int dz = coord_z(g->nodes[g->edges[i].dst].coord);
            if (dz == z) {
                int dy = coord_y(g->nodes[g->edges[i].dst].coord);
                if (dy > max_y) max_y = dy;
            }
        }
        for (int y = 0; y <= max_y; y++) {
            for (int i = 0; i < g->n_edges; i++) {
                Edge *e = &g->edges[i];
                int dz = coord_z(g->nodes[e->dst].coord);
                int dy = coord_y(g->nodes[e->dst].coord);
                if (dz != z || dy != y) continue;

                BitStream *a = &g->nodes[e->src_a].bs;
                BitStream *b = &g->nodes[e->src_b].bs;
                BitStream *d = &g->nodes[e->dst].bs;

                if (e->delay == 0) {
                    jxn_apply(a, b, d, e->jtype);
                } else {
                    int newest = jxn_newest_bit(a, b, e->jtype);
                    if (newest == e->pending_bit) e->consistent++;
                    else { e->pending_bit = newest; e->consistent = 1; }
                    int effective = (e->consistent * e->weight) / 255;
                    if (effective >= e->delay) {
                        jxn_apply(a, b, d, e->jtype);
                        e->last_output = newest;
                    } else {
                        bs_push(d, e->last_output);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

void graph_run(Graph *g, int n, int interval_us) {
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        graph_tick(g);
        if (interval_us > 0) T_sleep_us(interval_us);
    }
}

int graph_learn(Graph *g, int strengthen_thresh, int weaken_thresh, int rate) {
    int changed = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < g->n_edges; i++) {
        Edge *e = &g->edges[i];
        BitStream *a = &g->nodes[e->src_a].bs;
        BitStream *b = &g->nodes[e->src_b].bs;
        int n = a->len < b->len ? a->len : b->len;
        if (n < 20) continue;

        int corr = analysis_corr_pct(a, b);
        int old_w = e->weight;

        if (corr > strengthen_thresh) {
            int nw = e->weight + rate;
            e->weight = nw > 255 ? 255 : nw;
        } else if (corr < weaken_thresh) {
            int nw = e->weight - rate;
            e->weight = nw < 1 ? 1 : nw;
        }
        if (e->weight != old_w) changed++;
    }
    return changed;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   REPORTING
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

static const char *_jxn_names[] = {"XOR","AND","OR ","NND"};

void graph_report(Graph *g) {
    char pat[56];
    printf("\n  Nodes (%d):\n", g->n_nodes);
    printf("  %3s (%3s,%3s,%2s) %-14s %4s %s\n","ID","X","Y","Z","Name","Act%","Pattern");
    for (int i = 0; i < g->n_nodes; i++) {
        Node *n = &g->nodes[i];
        bs_pattern(&n->bs, pat, 50);
        printf("  %3d (%3d,%3d,%2d) %-14s %3d%% %s\n",
               i, coord_x(n->coord), coord_y(n->coord), coord_z(n->coord),
               n->name, bs_activity_pct(&n->bs), pat);
    }
    printf("\n  Edges (%d):\n", g->n_edges);
    for (int i = 0; i < g->n_edges; i++) {
        Edge *e = &g->edges[i];
        printf("  %3d %-10s %3s %-10s -> %-10s  W=%3d D=%d\n",
               i, g->nodes[e->src_a].name, _jxn_names[e->jtype],
               g->nodes[e->src_b].name, g->nodes[e->dst].name, e->weight, e->delay);
    }
}

void graph_corr_matrix(Graph *g) {
    int act[MAX_NODES], na = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < g->n_nodes; i++)
        if (g->nodes[i].bs.len > 10) act[na++] = i;
    if (na < 2 || na > 14) return;
    printf("\n  Correlations:\n  %12s","");
    for (int j = 0; j < na; j++) printf(" %6.6s", g->nodes[act[j]].name);
    printf("\n");
    for (int i = 0; i < na; i++) {
        printf("  %12s", g->nodes[act[i]].name);
        for (int j = 0; j < na; j++) {
            if (i == j) printf("  %4s ", "---");
            else printf("  %3d%% ", analysis_corr_pct(&g->nodes[act[i]].bs, &g->nodes[act[j]].bs));
        }
        printf("\n");
    }
}
/*
 * iron_xyzt_bridge.h — Connect IRON projections to XYZT graph engine
 *
 * Data flow:
 *   IRON /api/temporal → N×9 floats (trajectory)
 *       ↓
 *   bridge_feed_trajectory() → 9 transducers → 9 BitStreams at Z=0
 *       ↓
 *   graph_autowire() → collision edges at Z=1
 *       ↓
 *   graph_tick() → collision outputs
 *       ↓
 *   graph_learn() → Hebbian weight update
 *       ↓
 *   bridge_read_crystal() → converged edge weights = structural signature
 *
 * Usage in main.cu:
 *
 *   #include "iron_xyzt_bridge.h"
 *
 *   // At startup:
 *   IronXyztBridge bridge;
 *   bridge_init(&bridge);
 *
 *   // Per request (inside /api/crystal endpoint):
 *   bridge_reset(&bridge);
 *   for (int i = 0; i < n_chunks; i++)
 *       bridge_feed_chunk(&bridge, &trajectory[i * 9]);
 *   bridge_collide(&bridge);
 *   bridge_learn(&bridge, 20);  // 20 rounds of Hebbian
 *   CrystalResult result = bridge_read_crystal(&bridge);
 */

#ifndef IRON_XYZT_BRIDGE_H
#define IRON_XYZT_BRIDGE_H

#include "xyzt_lib.h"

#ifdef __cplusplus
extern "C" {
#endif

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
   BRIDGE TYPES
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/*
 * 9 projection dimensions from IRON:
 *   3 windows (w2, w8, w64) × 3 primes (137, 251, 397)
 *   Each produces (content_hash, potential) → we use potential
 *
 * Laid out in the graph as:
 *   X = prime index (0, 1, 2)
 *   Y = window index (0, 1, 2)
 *   Z = 0 (sensor), 1+ (collision/cascade)
 */

#define BRIDGE_N_PRIMES   3
#define BRIDGE_N_WINDOWS  3
#define BRIDGE_N_SENSORS  (BRIDGE_N_PRIMES * BRIDGE_N_WINDOWS)  /* 9 */
#define BRIDGE_MAX_EDGES  128

typedef struct {
    int edge_idx;       /* index into graph.edges[] */
    int src_a, src_b;   /* node indices */
    JunctionType jtype;
    uint8_t weight;     /* current weight after learning */
    int corr_pct;       /* last measured correlation */
    char label[48];     /* "w2_p137 XOR w8_p251" */
} CrystalEdge;

typedef struct {
    CrystalEdge edges[BRIDGE_MAX_EDGES];
    int n_edges;
    int n_learn_rounds;
    int n_chunks_fed;

    /* Summary stats */
    int strongest_edge;     /* index of highest weight */
    int weakest_edge;       /* index of lowest weight */
    float avg_weight;
    int n_strong;           /* weight > 200 */
    int n_weak;             /* weight < 30 */
} CrystalResult;

typedef struct {
    Graph       graph;
    int         sensor_nodes[BRIDGE_N_SENSORS];   /* node IDs for 9 sensors */
    Transducer  xdcrs[BRIDGE_N_SENSORS];          /* one per sensor */
    int         n_chunks;
    int         wired;      /* have we auto-wired yet? */
} IronXyztBridge;

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
   BRIDGE API
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* Initialize bridge (call once at startup) */
static inline void bridge_init(IronXyztBridge *b) {
    T_init();
    graph_init(&b->graph);
    b->n_chunks = 0;
    b->wired = 0;

    /* Create 9 sensor nodes in a 3×3 grid at Z=0 */
    static const char *prime_names[] = {"p137", "p251", "p397"};
    static const char *win_names[]   = {"w2", "w8", "w64"};

    for (int w = 0; w < BRIDGE_N_WINDOWS; w++) {
        for (int p = 0; p < BRIDGE_N_PRIMES; p++) {
            int idx = w * BRIDGE_N_PRIMES + p;
            char name[24];
            snprintf(name, 24, "%s_%s", win_names[w], prime_names[p]);

            /* Place at (X=p, Y=w, Z=0) */
            b->sensor_nodes[idx] = graph_add_node(&b->graph, p, w, 0, name);
            xdcr_init(&b->xdcrs[idx]);
        }
    }
}

/* Reset for new input (keeps structure, clears data) */
static inline void bridge_reset(IronXyztBridge *b) {
    for (int i = 0; i < BRIDGE_N_SENSORS; i++) {
        bs_clear(&b->graph.nodes[b->sensor_nodes[i]].bs);
        xdcr_init(&b->xdcrs[i]);
    }
    /* Clear all Z>0 nodes */
    for (int i = BRIDGE_N_SENSORS; i < b->graph.n_nodes; i++)
        bs_clear(&b->graph.nodes[i].bs);
    /* Reset edge states */
    for (int i = 0; i < b->graph.n_edges; i++) {
        b->graph.edges[i].pending_bit = 0;
        b->graph.edges[i].consistent = 0;
        b->graph.edges[i].last_output = 0;
        b->graph.edges[i].weight = 128;  /* reset to neutral */
    }
    b->n_chunks = 0;
    b->wired = 0;
}

/*
 * Feed one chunk of IRON trajectory data.
 * floats[0..8] = 9 projection values from /api/temporal
